amazon-rituals.name: Amazon Rituals
amazon-rituals.flavour: Little is known about Amazon magic beyond their island home. It is said that the immortal Amazons learn their magic from the very gods themselves.

spells.name: Singing Wind
spells.flavour: The priestess calls upon the power of Shaekal the Wind Goddess to enter the battlefield.
spells.ruleFull: The goddess appears in the form of singing motes and dancing lights that will entrance and ‘hold’ any model within 10" until the start of the Amazon player’s next turn. The model cannot move, shoot, or cast spells, but may defend itself in hand-to-hand combat. Models affected by this ritual automatically go last in combat.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The goddess appears in the form of singing motes and dancing lights that will entrance and ‘hold' any model within 10" until the start of the Amazon player's next turn. The model cannot move, shoot, or cast spells, but may defend itself in hand-to-hand combat. Models affected by this ritual automatically go last in combat.

spells.name: Serpent’s Strength
spells.flavour: The priestess begins the ritual by dancing wildly and screaming in an ancient tongue.
spells.ruleFull: All friendly models close to the Priestess will be charged with a frantic energy until the end of their next turn. During this time any model within 8" of the Priestess (including herself) will add +1 to their Strength. The ritual cannot be cast if the Priestess is in close combat during her Shooting phase. The effects will continue after the ritual is cast if the Priestess enters combat.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All friendly models close to the Priestess will be charged with a frantic energy until the end of their next turn. During this time any model within 8" of the Priestess (including herself) will add +1 to their Strength. The ritual cannot be cast if the Priestess is in close combat during her Shooting phase. The effects will continue after the ritual is cast if the Priestess enters combat.

spells.name: Wendala’s Maelstrom
spells.flavour: The priestess summons harsh tropical winds to protect the Amazons from enemy ranged attacks.
spells.ruleFull: The storm extends out from the Priestess 18". All attempts to shoot missile weapons by the enemy will be at -1 to hit. The ritual lasts up until the start of the Amazon player’s next turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The storm extends out from the Priestess 18". All attempts to shoot missile weapons by the enemy will be at -1 to hit. The ritual lasts up until the start of the Amazon player's next turn.

spells.name: Shield of Thorns
spells.flavour: Moving her arms about in a weaving motion, the priestess calls upon the plants to protect her.
spells.ruleFull: The ritual produces a cocoon of thorns all about the Priestess, making her immune to ranged or magical attacks. Any models wishing to charge the Priestess can do so but the thorns negate any strikes by the Priestess and her enemies in the first round of combat. The Priestess cannot cast this ritual while in hand-to-hand combat.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The ritual produces a cocoon of thorns all about the Priestess, making her immune to ranged or magical attacks. Any models wishing to charge the Priestess can do so but the thorns negate any strikes by the Priestess and her enemies in the first round of combat. The Priestess cannot cast this ritual while in hand-to-hand combat.

spells.name: The Living Jungle
spells.flavour: Drawing upon her will, the Priestess reaches out to the denizens of the jungle, seeking their aid.
spells.ruleFull: Pick one model within 12". The model is suddenly swarmed by a savage mix of snakes, spiders and insects, most of them poisonous. The afflicted model takes 1D6 Strength 2 hits with no armour saves allowed apart from Ward saves. You cannot use a dodge save against a swarm.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Pick one model within 12". The model is suddenly swarmed by a savage mix of snakes, spiders and insects, most of them poisonous. The afflicted model takes 1D6 Strength 2 hits with no armour saves allowed apart from Ward saves. You cannot use a dodge save against a swarm.

spells.name: Siren’s Dreams
spells.flavour: The priestess starts to sing with a wondrous voice and all the Amazons join in with her.
spells.ruleFull: The song is so beautiful and mesmerising that it momentarily distracts the Amazon’s enemies within 12" such that all Ld tests for the opposing warband are made at -1 until the end of the opposing player’s next turn. Lizardmen and Undead are immune to the effects of this ritual.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The song is so beautiful and mesmerising that it momentarily distracts the Amazon's enemies within 12" such that all Ld tests for the opposing warband are made at -1 until the end of the opposing player's next turn. Lizardmen and Undead are immune to the effects of this ritual.

arabian-elemental-magic.name: Arabian Elemental Magic
arabian-elemental-magic.flavour: The magic of the Djinn is a rare, almost lost, art among men. It is the preserve of the Djinn of the deep desert and of those Djinn unfortunate enough to be captured.

spells.name: Riding the Wind
spells.ruleFull:
.

This spell is cast at the beginning of the caster’s Movement phase. The caster may move up to 12+D6" anywhere on the battlefield, ignoring any intervening terrain; this counts as the caster’s movement for that turn. This spell may not be used to move the caster into base contact with an enemy warrior, but the caster may shoot as normal (with a -1 penalty for having moved).
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell is cast at the beginning of the caster's Movement phase. The caster may move up to 12+D6" anywhere on the battlefield, ignoring any intervening terrain; this counts as the caster's movement for that turn. This spell may not be used to move the caster into base contact with an enemy warrior, but the caster may shoot as normal (with a -1 penalty for having moved).

spells.name: Skin of Stone
spells.flavour: Calling upon the Element of the Earth, the caster is able to make a warrior’s skin become as hard as stone.
spells.ruleFull: This spell may be cast on any friendly warrior within 6". The target gains +2 to his armour save but suffers a -1 penalty to Initiative. The spell may be maintained each turn, providing the affected warrior remains within 6" of the caster and the caster can pass a Difficulty test. If the caster is more than 6" away from the affected warrior in the Recovery phase, the spell cannot be maintained and wears off. Only one warrior may be affected by a Stone Skin spell at any one time, although the caster is free to cast other spells while maintaining the Stone Skin.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell may be cast on any friendly warrior within 6". The target gains +2 to his armour save but suffers a -1 penalty to Initiative. The spell may be maintained each turn, providing the affected warrior remains within 6" of the caster and the caster can pass a Difficulty test. If the caster is more than 6" away from the affected warrior in the Recovery phase, the spell cannot be maintained and wears off. Only one warrior may be affected by a Stone Skin spell at any one time, although the caster is free to cast other spells while maintaining the Stone Skin.

spells.name: Burning Hand
spells.flavour: By invoking the Element of Fire, one of the caster’s hands becomes a burning bolt which he can use to smite his enemies.
spells.ruleFull: This spell is cast at the beginning of the Combat phase. The caster may sacrifice all of his normal attacks to make one hand-to-hand attack at Strength 5, causing 2 wounds. If the enemy warrior is successfully hit, he is set on fire on a roll of 4+. This spell lasts for one round only.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell is cast at the beginning of the Combat phase. The caster may sacrifice all of his normal attacks to make one hand-to-hand attack at Strength 5, causing 2 wounds. If the enemy warrior is successfully hit, he is set on fire on a roll of 4+. This spell lasts for one round only.

spells.name: Quicksand
spells.flavour: By invoking the Element of Water, water rises from the very rocks and sand and turns the ground to quicksand.
spells.ruleFull: This spell is cast at any warrior within 6". The water floods the area for 3" around the targeted warrior. The effect lasts until the beginning of the caster’s next Recovery phase. All warriors within the quicksand must pass a Strength test or be unable to move. Warriors in combat cannot attack but may defend themselves.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell is cast at any warrior within 6". The water floods the area for 3" around the targeted warrior. The effect lasts until the beginning of the caster's next Recovery phase. All warriors within the quicksand must pass a Strength test or be unable to move. Warriors in combat cannot attack but may defend themselves.

spells.name: Storm of Magic
spells.flavour: By breaching the very fabric of reality, the caster is able to summon a bolt of pure magical energy.
spells.ruleFull: The caster may target any warrior within 12". If the spell is successfully cast, the target is struck by a bolt of energy and takes one S5 hit. Armour saves may be taken as normal.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The caster may target any warrior within 12". If the spell is successfully cast, the target is struck by a bolt of energy and takes one S5 hit. Armour saves may be taken as normal.

spells.name: Blessing of the Elements
spells.flavour: The caster calls on the elements of the desert and draws upon the fortune they can bestow.
spells.ruleFull: In the post-battle sequence, the player may re-roll any one dice or modify one dice by +1/-1. If the caster was taken out of action, this spell may not be cast.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: In the post-battle sequence, the player may re-roll any one dice or modify one dice by +1/-1. If the caster was taken out of action, this spell may not be cast.

chaos-dwarfs-magic.name: Chaos Dwarfs Magic
chaos-dwarfs-magic.flavour: Chaos rituals employ the raw power of the darkest magic, and are therefore supremely useful in bringing pain and suffering, as well as change and mutation.

spells.name: Spectre of Hashut
spells.flavour: A spectral apparition of the god Hashut hits the miniature closest to the sorcerer.
spells.ruleFull: Designate the enemy miniature closest to the wizard’s miniature within 10”. That miniature is automatically stunned.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Designate the enemy miniature closest to the wizard's miniature within 10". That miniature is automatically stunned.

spells.name: Stone Statue
spells.flavour: By using illusory magic, the sorcerer turns his closest enemy into a stone statue.
spells.ruleFull: Choose an enemy miniature that is within 12” of you and is in your line of sight. For the rest of the turn and the following turn, the miniature will not be able to do anything. If attacked in melee, the miniature will suffer an automatic hit. If it is shot, the miniature that shoots at it will get a +1 bonus on hit.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Choose an enemy miniature that is within 12" of you and is in your line of sight. For the rest of the turn and the following turn, the miniature will not be able to do anything. If attacked in melee, the miniature will suffer an automatic hit. If it is shot, the miniature that shoots at it will get a +1 bonus on hit.

spells.name: Fireball
spells.flavour: The wizard summons a ball of flames that he casts on his enemies.
spells.ruleFull: This spell has a range of 16” and requires line of sight. The target receives an automatic hit of strength 4.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell has a range of 16" and requires line of sight. The target receives an automatic hit of strength 4.

spells.name: Vanish
spells.flavour: The sorcerer vanishes in front of the enemy’s eyes only to reappear elsewhere on the battlefield.
spells.ruleFull: The wizard may immediately make a move of up to 6” in any direction and may enter or leave combat without penalty. If he enters combat, he is considered to be making a charge move.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The wizard may immediately make a move of up to 6" in any direction and may enter or leave combat without penalty. If he enters combat, he is considered to be making a charge move.

spells.name: Eruption
spells.flavour: After emitting a scream, the sorcerer turns into a red incandescent ball while a torrent of lava and stones gushes from his mouth and skin.
spells.ruleFull: All miniatures within a distance of up to 4” (friend or foe) suffer an automatic hit of Strength 4. After resolving the effects of this hit, the sorcerer will not be able to cast any more spells until the next turn and will suffer a -1 to his Toughness attribute.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All miniatures within a distance of up to 4" (friend or foe) suffer an automatic hit of Strength 4. After resolving the effects of this hit, the sorcerer will not be able to cast any more spells until the next turn and will suffer a -1 to his Toughness attribute.

spells.name: Eye of Hashut
spells.flavour: The wizard opens his arms while summoning the mighty Hashut to help his children and give them strength.
spells.ruleFull:
Choose a friendly miniature within 12” and roll 1D6. Hobgoblins always subtract 1 from the result.

You may use the Eye of Hashut successfully only once per battle.

  1D6  Result
1Hashut does not trust you. The miniature is immediately out of action, although it will not roll on the serious injury table during the post-battle sequence.
2-5Hashut trusts you. The miniature adds +1 to one of its attributes for the rest of the game.
6Hashut favors you. The miniature adds +1 to all attributes for the rest of the game.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Choose a friendly miniature within 12" and roll 1D6. Hobgoblins always subtract 1 from the result. You may use the Eye of Hashut successfully only once per battle. 1: Hashut does not trust you. The miniature is immediately out of action, although it will not roll on the serious injury table during the post-battle sequence.; 2-5: Hashut trusts you. The miniature adds +1 to one of its attributes for the rest of the game.; 6: Hashut favors you. The miniature adds +1 to all attributes for the rest of the game.

chaos-rituals.name: Chaos Rituals

permittedWarbands.prerequisite: with the Mark of Chaos Undivided

chaos-rituals.flavour: Chaos rituals employ the raw power of the darkest magic, and are therefore supremely useful in bringing pain and suffering, as well as change and mutation.

spells.name: Vision of Torment
spells.flavour: The Chaos Mage summons horrible visions of the realm of Chaos, causing his enemy to recoil in utter horror.
spells.ruleFull: This spell has a range of 6" and must be cast on the closest enemy model. If the Chaos Mage is in hand-to-hand combat, he must choose his target from those in base contact with him. The affected model is immediately stunned. If the model cannot be stunned it is knocked down instead.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell has a range of 6" and must be cast on the closest enemy model. If the Chaos Mage is in hand-to-hand combat, he must choose his target from those in base contact with him. The affected model is immediately stunned. If the model cannot be stunned it is knocked down instead.

spells.name: Eye of God
spells.flavour: The Chaos Mage implores the Dark gods to grant a boon to their servant.
spells.ruleFull:
You may use the Eye of God successfully only once per battle. Choose any single model within 6", friend or foe. Roll a D6 to see what happens to the affected model.

  D6  Result
1The wrath of the gods descends upon the target. The model is taken out of action immediately. He does not have to roll on the Serious Injury chart after the battle though.
2-5The model gains +1 to any one of his characteristics during this battle (chosen by the player who cast the spell).
6The model gains +1 to all of its characteristics for the duration of the battle.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: You may use the Eye of God successfully only once per battle. Choose any single model within 6", friend or foe. Roll a D6 to see what happens to the affected model. 1: The wrath of the gods descends upon the target. The model is taken out of action immediately. He does not have to roll on the Serious Injury chart after the battle though.; 2-5: The model gains +1 to any one of his characteristics during this battle (chosen by the player who cast the spell).; 6: The model gains +1 to all of its characteristics for the duration of the battle.

spells.name: Dark Blood
spells.flavour: The Chaos Mage cuts his palm and his blood spurts out, burning flesh and armour.
spells.ruleFull: This attack has a range of 8" and causes D3 S5 hits. It hits the first model in its path. After using this spell the Chaos Mage must roll on the Injury table for himself to see how dangerous the wound is, though treat the out of action result as stunned instead.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This attack has a range of 8" and causes D3 S5 hits. It hits the first model in its path. After using this spell the Chaos Mage must roll on the Injury table for himself to see how dangerous the wound is, though treat the out of action result as stunned instead.

spells.name: Lure of Chaos
spells.flavour: The Chaos Mage calls upon the taint of chaos which exists in the inner soul of all living beings.
spells.ruleFull: The spell has a range of 12" and must be cast on the closest enemy model. Roll a D6 and add the Chaos Mage’s Leadership to the score. Then roll a D6 and add the target’s Leadership to the score. If the Chaos Mage beats his opponent’s score he gains control of the model until the model passes a Leadership test in his own recovery phase. The model may not commit suicide, but can attack models on his own side, and will not fight warriors from the Chaos Mage’s warband. If he was engaged in hand-to-hand combat with any warriors of the Chaos Mage’s warband, they will immediately move 1" apart.<sup><Tooltip content="faq92">❓</Tooltip></sup>
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The spell has a range of 12" and must be cast on the closest enemy model. Roll a D6 and add the Chaos Mage's Leadership to the score. Then roll a D6 and add the target's Leadership to the score. If the Chaos Mage beats his opponent's score he gains control of the model until the model passes a Leadership test in his own recovery phase. The model may not commit suicide, but can attack models on his own side, and will not fight warriors from the Chaos Mage's warband. If he was engaged in hand-to-hand combat with any warriors of the Chaos Mage's warband, they will immediately move 1" apart.

spells.name: Wings of Darkness
spells.flavour: The Chaos Mage is lifted from the ground by two shadowy Daemons and carried wherever he wants to go.
spells.ruleFull: The Chaos Mage may immediately move anywhere within 12", including into base contact with an enemy, in which case he counts as charging. If he engages a fleeing enemy, in the close combat phase he will score one automatic hit and then his opponent will flee again (if he survives).
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Chaos Mage may immediately move anywhere within 12", including into base contact with an enemy, in which case he counts as charging. If he engages a fleeing enemy, in the close combat phase he will score one automatic hit and then his opponent will flee again (if he survives).

spells.name: Word of Pain
spells.flavour: Speaking the forbidden name of his dark god, the Chaos Mage causes indescribable pain to all who hear it.
spells.ruleFull: All models within 3" of the Chaos Mage, friend or foe, suffer one S3 hit. No armour saves are allowed.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All models within 3" of the Chaos Mage, friend or foe, suffer one S3 hit. No armour saves are allowed.

charms-and-hexes.name: Charms & Hexes
charms-and-hexes.flavour: Charms and Hexes are the magic of Witches. They involve copious amounts of spell ingredients and painstaking incantations but they can be devastating, reducing enemies to pitiful wrecks and infusing comrades with almost incomprehensible luck.

spells.name: Scry
spells.flavour: The Witch uses ancient diving crystals to foretell the future and influence the actions of her comrades.
spells.ruleFull: For the duration of the turn one hero or henchman may re-roll D3 dice rolls and add +1 or -1 to the result.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: For the duration of the turn one hero or henchman may re-roll D3 dice rolls and add +1 or -1 to the result.

spells.name: Curse
spells.flavour: The Witch bestows a powerful curse on one of her enemies that saps their confidence and resolve.
spells.ruleFull: One enemy model within 12" of the Witch must re-roll all successful dice rolls for the duration of this and their next turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: One enemy model within 12" of the Witch must re-roll all successful dice rolls for the duration of this and their next turn.

spells.name: Dust of the Blind
spells.flavour: Casting a handful of dust into the air, the Witch blows it around her, blinding her enemies.
spells.ruleFull: One enemy model within 16" of the Witch is struck instantly blind. They may not shoot, charge or run, are at half Weapon Skill and will move in a random direction at the start of their turn. The Blindness lasts until the Witch casts another spell or moves.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: One enemy model within 16" of the Witch is struck instantly blind. They may not shoot, charge or run, are at half Weapon Skill and will move in a random direction at the start of their turn. The Blindness lasts until the Witch casts another spell or moves.

spells.name: Age of Stone
spells.flavour: Whispering words of ancient power, the Witch causes an enemy to age rapidly before their very eyes, making them weak and feeble!
spells.ruleFull: One enemy model within 12" of the Witch will be severely debilitated and all of their characteristics are reduced by -1 for the duration of this and their next turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: One enemy model within 12" of the Witch will be severely debilitated and all of their characteristics are reduced by -1 for the duration of this and their next turn.

spells.name: Warrior's Bane
spells.flavour: Muttering a dark and malicious incantation, the Witch causes a warrior's grip to loosen, making it almost impossible for them to attack.
spells.ruleFull: One enemy model within 18" of the Witch will be unable to use any of their weapons as they perpetually slip from their grasp. They will be unable to shoot and count as fighting with fists in Hand-to-Hand combat. The enchantment lasts for the duration of this and their next turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: One enemy model within 18" of the Witch will be unable to use any of their weapons as they perpetually slip from their grasp. They will be unable to shoot and count as fighting with fists in Hand-to-Hand combat. The enchantment lasts for the duration of this and their next turn.

spells.name: Cure
spells.flavour: A faint aura extends from the Witch's body. All who are touched by it feel warmth and vitality flowing through their veins.
spells.ruleFull: All friendly models within 6" of the Witch have a single wound healed. In addition any stunned or knocked down models may immediately stand up.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All friendly models within 6" of the Witch have a single wound healed. In addition any stunned or knocked down models may immediately stand up.

dark-elf-magic.name: Dark Elf Magic
dark-elf-magic.flavour: The Dark Elves are as accomplished practitioners of magic as their arch enemies the High Elves but whereas the High Elves essentially use magic defensively and for the power of good, the Dark Elves utilise the evil powers of Dark Magic a very destructive force indeed.

spells.name: Doombolt
spells.flavour: Whispering an ancient incantation the Sorceress conjures a bolt of pure dark energy and unleashes it from her outstretched hand.
spells.ruleFull: The bolt of doom may be targeted at any enemy model in line of sight. The Doombolt has an 18" range and causes a Strength 5 hit. If the target model is wounded, then the next closest model within 6" is also hit on a 4+, at -1 Strength than the previous hit. The bolt will keep leaping until there are no more targets within range or until its Strength drops to a one. Each model can only be hit by a bolt once per turn. Take armour saves as normal.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Range 18". Target suffers a Strength 5 hit; if wounded the bolt leaps to the next closest model within 6" on a 4+ at -1 Strength, continuing until no targets remain or Strength reaches 1.

spells.name: Word of Pain
spells.flavour: The Sorceress calls the curse of the Witch King down on his enemy reducing their willingness to fight.
spells.ruleFull: The spell may be cast at an enemy model within 12". The victim must re-roll all successful hand to hand or missile attacks and all to wound rolls. If the victim wishes to charge, he must pass a successful Leadership test first. Lasts until the beginning of the next Dark Elf turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Range 12". Target must re-roll successful hit and wound rolls and must pass a Leadership test to charge until the next Dark Elf turn.

spells.name: Soul Stealer
spells.flavour: At the Sorceress’s touch, the essence of life is drained from her enemy and absorbed into her body giving him renewed strength and vigour.
spells.ruleFull: Once successfully cast, the Sorceress must make a to hit roll against a model in base contact. If the attack hits, the opponent suffers a wound with no armour save possible. The Sorceress feeds on this life-force and adds one wound to her profile. The Sorceress can never have more than one extra wound from this spell and the extra wound is lost at the end of the battle.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Caster makes a to-hit roll against a model in base contact; if successful the target suffers a wound with no armour save and the Sorceress gains one temporary wound.

spells.name: Flamesword
spells.flavour: Summoning Dark Magic the Sorceress engulfs a weapon in twisted black flames.
spells.ruleFull: The Sorceress may choose the hand-to-hand combat weapon of a member of her warband within 6" to be engulfed in flames. The weapon acts as normal but grants +2 Strength and ignores armour saves. The spell lasts until the Sorceress’ next shooting phase.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Range 6". A friendly weapon gains +2 Strength and ignores armour saves until the Sorceress’ next shooting phase.

spells.name: Deathspasm
spells.flavour: The Sorceress channels Dark Magic into her enemy, causing him to writhe in excruciating pain.
spells.ruleFull: The Deathspasm has a range of 6" and must be cast on the closest enemy model. The affected model must roll on the injury chart. If successfully cast, the casting Sorceress is immediately knocked down.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Range 6". Closest enemy rolls on the injury chart; the Sorceress is immediately knocked down after casting.

spells.name: Witch Flight
spells.flavour: The Sorceress bends the winds of magic to her will and flies through the air.
spells.ruleFull: The Sorceress may immediately move anywhere within 12" and may count as charging. If she engages a fleeing enemy in the close combat phase she will score 1 automatic hit and the opponent will flee again.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Sorceress may immediately move up to 12" and may count as charging. If she contacts a fleeing enemy she inflicts one automatic hit.

spells.name: Wind of Gork
spells.flavour: A blast of foul flatulence signals G’rrk’s Wrath.
spells.ruleFull: A blast of foul flatulence signals Gork’s wrath. Range: 12". The first model in its path must roll under its Toughness or take a S2 hit and be knocked down automatically.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Range: 12". The first model in its path must roll under its Toughness or take a S2 hit and be knocked down automatically.

spells.name: Gaze of Mork
spells.flavour: The Shaman invokes the presence of the God Mork to smite his foes with lightning.
spells.ruleFull: Range 12". D3 S3 hits strike the first model in their path.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Range 12". D3 S3 hits strike the first model in their path.

spells.name: ‘Eadbanger
spells.flavour: The Shaman channels pure Waaagh! energy through his body and vomits it toward the enemy.
spells.ruleFull: Range 6". Fire bolts equal to the number of the Shaman’s Attacks. Resolve with Strength equal to the Shaman’s Toughness at the first model in their path. After the bolts effects are resolved, roll a die. On a 1 the Shaman has drawn upon too much power. The Shaman collapses and goes out of action.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Range 6". Fire bolts equal to the number of the Shaman’s Attacks, using Strength equal to the Shaman’s Toughness.

spells.name: Leap of Waaagh!
spells.flavour: The Shaman summons a giant green hand to lift any Goblin and carry him into the fray.
spells.ruleFull: The Shaman or any other Goblin within 3" may be moved up to 12". If this move brings them into close combat, they count as charging in the close combat phase.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Shaman or any other Goblin within 3" may be moved up to 12" and counts as charging if moved into close combat.

spells.name: Idol of Gork
spells.flavour: Swirling energy crackles around the Shaman, giving him the appearance of a huge orc hero.
spells.ruleFull: The Shaman gains +1 WS, +1 S, and +1 A. This enhancement lasts until the Shaman takes a wound.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Shaman gains +1 WS, +1 S, and +1 A until he takes a wound.

spells.name: ‘Ere we go
spells.flavour: The Shaman and nearby Goblins become filled with the essence of the Waaagh!
spells.ruleFull: All friendly models within 6" of the Shaman treat stunned results on the injury table as knocked down instead. The effects last until the Shaman takes a wound.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All friendly models within 6" of the Shaman treat stunned results on the injury table as knocked down until the Shaman takes a wound.

funerary-rites.name: Funerary Rites
funerary-rites.flavour: Priests of Morr use Funerary rites to insure that the dead remain dead, that their body is sanctified and sealed and their soul safely passed into Morrs keeping.

spells.name: Morr’s Protection
spells.flavour: The Priest of Morr calls out to his god when confronted by an abomination and asks that he be shielded from the corrupted magic of the tainted.
spells.ruleFull: Any Magical attacks made by a Necromancer, a Magister or Daemons, which would be considered a direct attack on the priest, will be negated if this rite is successful.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Any Magical attacks made by a Necromancer, a Magister or Daemons, which would be considered a direct attack on the priest, will be negated if this rite is successful.

spells.name: Death Holds No Fear
spells.flavour: Priests of Morr must be steadfast in their resolution and as such must, above all else, have no fear of death.
spells.ruleFull: The priest of Morr is now Fearless for the remainder of the game.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The priest of Morr is now Fearless for the remainder of the game.

spells.name: Sanctity of the Fallen
spells.flavour: Those who fall shall be sanctified and their soul freed, in the name of Morr, god of death.
spells.ruleFull: The priest of Morr may attempt to perform the Rite of Sanctity on a model (friend or foe) who has been taken Out of Action. The priest of Morr must be within 6” of the model in question. If successful, the model may not be raised up by a Necromancer.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The priest of Morr may attempt to perform the Rite of Sanctity on a model (friend or foe) who has been taken Out of Action. The priest of Morr must be within 6" of the model in question. If successful, the model may not be raised up by a Necromancer.

spells.name: Hand of Morr
spells.flavour: 'By his the hand of Morr, the Undead shall become as dust and ashes'
spells.ruleFull: The priest of Morr must be in base-to-base contact with an Undead model. Before Hand-to-Hand combat occurs, the priest of Morr may attempt to use the Hand of Morr rite. If successful the foe immediately goes out of action (this affects Zombies, Dire Wolves and Vampires). Ghouls and Possessed affected by this rite will immediately flee their full Move away from the priest of Morr.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The priest of Morr must be in base-to-base contact with an Undead model. Before Hand-to-Hand combat occurs, the priest of Morr may attempt to use the Hand of Morr rite. If successful the foe immediately goes out of action (this affects Zombies, Dire Wolves and Vampires). Ghouls and Possessed affected by this rite will immediately flee their full Move away from the priest of Morr.

spells.name: Do you know who I am?
spells.flavour: ‘Gaze upon me, abomination, for I am a priest of Morr'.
spells.ruleFull: This rite has a range of 6” and must be directed at the closest Undead model first, or if no Undead are within range, at the next closest human servant of the Undead (Dregs, Ghouls, Necromancers), or finally at any model. If successful, that model is immediately Stunned. If the model cannot be Stunned, then it is Knocked Down instead.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This rite has a range of 6" and must be directed at the closest Undead model first, or if no Undead are within range, at the next closest human servant of the Undead (Dregs, Ghouls, Necromancers), or finally at any model. If successful, that model is immediately Stunned. If the model cannot be Stunned, then it is Knocked Down instead.

spells.name: I am death!
spells.flavour: 'I am a priest of Morr, god of death!' It is a well-known fact that the priests of Morr are not martially inclined. Their divine duties involved the dead, not the taking of life. However, there are times when a priest of Morr will he called to engage in combat and who would be more feared than a representative of the god of Death?
spells.ruleFull: This spell gives the priest of Morr a 6+ armour save and increases their WS by either +1 or makes it 4, whichever is greater.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell gives the priest of Morr a 6+ armour save and increases their WS by either +1 or makes it 4, whichever is greater.

spells.name: Wind of Gork
spells.flavour: A blast of foul flatulence signals G’rrk’s Wrath.
spells.ruleFull: Range: 12". The first model in its path must roll under its Toughness or take a Strength 2 hit and be knocked down automatically.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Range: 12". The first model in its path must roll under its Toughness or take a Strength 2 hit and be knocked down automatically.

spells.name: Gaze of Mork
spells.flavour: The Shaman invokes the presence of the God Mork to smite their foes with lightning.
spells.ruleFull: Range: 12". D3 Strength 3 hits strike the first model in their path.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Range: 12". D3 Strength 3 hits strike the first model in their path.

spells.name: ‘Eadbanger
spells.flavour: The Shaman channels pure Waaagh! energy through their body and vomits it toward the enemy.
spells.ruleFull: Range: 6". Fire bolts equal to the number of the Shaman’s Base Attacks. Resolve with Strength equal to the Shaman’s Toughness at the first model in their path. After the bolts effects are resolved, roll a die. On a 1 the Shaman has drawn upon too much power, they collapse and goes Out of Action.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Range: 6". Fire bolts equal to the number of the Shaman's Base Attacks. Resolve with Strength equal to the Shaman's Toughness at the first model in their path. After the bolts effects are resolved, roll a die. On a 1 the Shaman has drawn upon too much power, they collapse and goes Out of Action.

spells.name: Leap of Waaagh!
spells.flavour: The Shaman summons a giant green hand to lift any Goblin and carry them into the fray.
spells.ruleFull: The Shaman or any other Goblin within 3" may be moved up to 12", ignoring terrain. If this move brings them into close combat, they count as charging in the close combat phase.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Shaman or any other Goblin within 3" may be moved up to 12", ignoring terrain. If this move brings them into close combat, they count as charging in the close combat phase.

spells.name: Idol of Gork
spells.flavour: Swirling energy crackles around the Shaman, giving them the appearance of a huge Orc hero.
spells.ruleFull: The Shaman gains +1 WS, +1 S, and +1 A. This enhancement lasts until the Shaman takes a wound.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Shaman gains +1 WS, +1 S, and +1 A. This enhancement lasts until the Shaman takes a wound.

spells.name: ‘Ere we go!
spells.flavour: The Shaman and nearby allies become filled with the essence of the Waaagh!
spells.ruleFull: All friendly models within 6" of the Shaman treat stunned results on the Injury Table as knocked down instead. The effects last until the Shaman takes a wound.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All friendly models within 6" of the Shaman treat stunned results on the Injury Table as knocked down instead. The effects last until the Shaman takes a wound.

ladys-prayers.name: Lady’s Prayers
ladys-prayers.notes: Prayers are not regarded as spells, so any special protection against spells does not affect them.

spells.name: Lady’s Favors
spells.ruleFull: All your heroes count as having Lucky Charms for this battle and ignore the first hit against them on a D6 roll of 4+. If they already own Lucky Charms, they may reroll a failed Lucky Charm save, accepting the second result.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All your heroes count as having Lucky Charms for this battle and ignore the first hit against them on a D6 roll of 4+. If they already own Lucky Charms, they may reroll a failed Lucky Charm save, accepting the second result.

spells.name: Blessed Protection
spells.ruleFull: The Damsel and any Bretonnians within 6" of her gain an unmodified ward save of 4+ against the effects of spells or prayers. Test each shooting phase: on a roll of 1 or 2, the spell dissipates.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Damsel and any Bretonnians within 6" of her gain an unmodified ward save of 4+ against the effects of spells or prayers. Test each shooting phase: on a roll of 1 or 2, the spell dissipates.

spells.name: Swiftstride
spells.ruleFull: The damsel may pick a friendly hero or henchman (including herself) within 12” that charged or failed a charge this turn. That warrior gains +1 to hit on all attacks they make until the end of the turn. In addition, if they are not in combat, they may make an additional move of 1D6” towards an enemy (if they move into base contact with an enemy, this counts as a charge).
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The damsel may pick a friendly hero or henchman (including herself) within 12" that charged or failed a charge this turn. That warrior gains +1 to hit on all attacks they make until the end of the turn. In addition, if they are not in combat, they may make an additional move of 1D6" towards an enemy (if they move into base contact with an enemy, this counts as a charge).

spells.name: Lady’s Scorn
spells.ruleFull: Anyone attempting to shoot at the Damsel must first pass a Leadership test, or else they are unable to fire this turn. This includes Silver Arrows, Crossbow Pistols, Hand-to-Hand Pistols, and Template shot weapons that she is within the path of (like Blunderbusses.) This spell lasts until the end of the game.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Anyone attempting to shoot at the Damsel must first pass a Leadership test, or else they are unable to fire this turn. This includes Silver Arrows, Crossbow Pistols, Hand-to-Hand Pistols, and Template shot weapons that she is within the path of (like Blunderbusses.) This spell lasts until the end of the game.

spells.name: Elixir of Life
spells.ruleFull: Any one model within 4” of the Damsel (including herself) may be healed. The warrior is restored to his full quota of Wounds. In addition, if any friendly models within 4” are stunned or knocked down, they immediately come to their senses, stand up, and continue fighting as normal.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Any one model within 4" of the Damsel (including herself) may be healed. The warrior is restored to his full quota of Wounds. In addition, if any friendly models within 4" are stunned or knocked down, they immediately come to their senses, stand up, and continue fighting as normal.

spells.name: Guiding Vision
spells.ruleFull: The Damsel picks a friendly hero or henchman within 8”. Until the start of your next shooting phase, that warrior may re-roll one die roll they make and add +1 or -1 to the result.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Damsel picks a friendly hero or henchman within 8". Until the start of your next shooting phase, that warrior may re-roll one die roll they make and add +1 or -1 to the result.

lesser-magic.name: Lesser Magic
lesser-magic.flavour: Those who have not been schooled in the ways of magic can cast only relatively simple spells. Many human wizards, lacking the tradition of sorcery and the grimoires of Necromancers and Chaos Mages, have to rely on their own natural aptitude and experimentation.

spells.name: Fires of U’Zhul
spells.flavour: The wizard summons a fiery ball of flames and hurls it upon his enemies.
spells.ruleFull: The fireball has a range of 18" and causes one Strength 4 hit. It strikes the first model in its path. Armour saves are taken as normal (ie, with -1 modifier).
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The fireball has a range of 18" and causes one Strength 4 hit. It strikes the first model in its path. Armour saves are taken as normal (ie, with -1 modifier).

spells.name: Flight of Zimmeran
spells.flavour: Calling upon the power of the winds of magic, the wizard walks on air.
spells.ruleFull: The wizard may immediately move anywhere within 12", including into base contact with an enemy, in which case he counts as charging. If he engages a fleeing enemy in the close combat phase he will score 1 automatic hit and then his opponent will flee again (if he survives).<sup><Tooltip content="faq89">❓</Tooltip></sup>
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The wizard may immediately move anywhere within 12", including into base contact with an enemy, in which case he counts as charging. If he engages a fleeing enemy in the close combat phase he will score 1 automatic hit and then his opponent will flee again (if he survives).

spells.name: Dread of Aramar
spells.flavour: The wizard places a sense of mind-numbing fear into the minds of his opponents.
spells.ruleFull: A single model within 12" of the wizard must pass a Leadership test or flee 2D6" directly away from him. If he flees, he must test at the start of each of his own movement phases and will continue to flee until he passes a test. Note that this spell does not affect Undead or any model immune to fear.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: A single model within 12" of the wizard must pass a Leadership test or flee 2D6" directly away from him. If he flees, he must test at the start of each of his own movement phases and will continue to flee until he passes a test. Note that this spell does not affect Undead or any model immune to fear.

spells.name: Silver Arrows of Arha
spells.flavour: Silvery arrows appear from thin air and circle around the wizard, shooting out to strike his foes.
spells.ruleFull: Unlike other spells, this cannot be cast whilst in hand-to-hand combat. The spell summons D6+2 arrows which the wizard can use to shoot against one enemy model.<sup><Tooltip content="err47">✏️</Tooltip></sup> The arrows have a range of 24". Use the wizard’s own Ballistic Skill to determine whether he hits or not, but ignore movement<sup><Tooltip content="faq91">❓</Tooltip></sup>, range and cover penalties. The arrows cause one S3 hit each.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Unlike other spells, this cannot be cast whilst in hand-to-hand combat. The spell summons D6+2 arrows which the wizard can use to shoot against one enemy model. The arrows have a range of 24". Use the wizard's own Ballistic Skill to determine whether he hits or not, but ignore movement, range and cover penalties. The arrows cause one S3 hit each.

spells.name: Luck of Shemtek
spells.flavour: The wizard summons the fickle power of magic to manipulate chance.
spells.ruleFull: The wizard may re-roll all his failed dice rolls, though the second results stand. The effect lasts until the beginning of his own next turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The wizard may re-roll all his failed dice rolls, though the second results stand. The effect lasts until the beginning of his own next turn.

spells.name: Sword of Rezhebel
spells.flavour: A flaming sword appears in the hand of the wizard, promising red ruin to all who stand in his way.
spells.ruleFull: The sword gives the wizard +1 Attack, +2 Strength and +2 Weapon Skill. Take a Leadership test at the beginning of each of the wizard’s own turns. If the test fails, the sword disappears.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The sword gives the wizard +1 Attack, +2 Strength and +2 Weapon Skill. Take a Leadership test at the beginning of each of the wizard's own turns. If the test fails, the sword disappears.

lizardmen-magic.name: Lizardman Magic
lizardmen-magic.notes: Lizardmen spells work like the Prayers of Sigmar and may be used even if the Skink Priest is wearing armour.

spells.name: Chotec’s Wrath
spells.ruleFull: A lightning bolt shoots from the sky above and strikes the closest enemy model within 10" of the Skink Priest, causing a single Strength 5 hit. However add +1 to the Strength and +1 to the roll on the injury table if the model is wearing armour like light armour, heavy armour, Ithilmar armour or Gromril armour.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: A lightning bolt shoots from the sky above and strikes the closest enemy model within 10" of the Skink Priest, causing a single Strength 5 hit. However add +1 to the Strength and +1 to the roll on the injury table if the model is wearing armour like light armour, heavy armour, Ithilmar armour or Gromril armour.

spells.name: Sotec’s Blessing
spells.ruleFull:
This spell may be cast on a single model within 6" of the Skink Priest or on himself. Roll a D6 to determine the blessing. The effects remain in play until the Priest or the model is Stunned or taken Out of Action. Only a single model may be affected by the blessing at any given time.

D6Effect
1-2+1 BS or +1 to hit in close combat.
3-4Toughness +1.
5-6Movement and Initiative +1.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell may be cast on a single model within 6" of the Skink Priest or on himself. Roll a D6 to determine the blessing. The effects remain in play until the Priest or the model is Stunned or taken Out of Action. Only a single model may be affected by the blessing at any given time. 1-2: +1 BS or +1 to hit in close combat.; 3-4: Toughness +1.; 5-6: Movement and Initiative +1.

spells.name: Huanchi’s Stealth
spells.ruleFull: The spell affects all Skinks within 6" of the Skink Priest, including himself, and allows any model that is in cover to immediately to go into hiding. A model may go into hiding even if they ran in the movement phase or has already shot with a missile weapon.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The spell affects all Skinks within 6" of the Skink Priest, including himself, and allows any model that is in cover to immediately to go into hiding. A model may go into hiding even if they ran in the movement phase or has already shot with a missile weapon.

spells.name: The Old Ones’ Protection
spells.ruleFull: The Skink Priest and any Lizardmen within 4" of him gain a save of 4+ against the effects of spells or prayers. This spell remains in play until the Skink Priest is taken Out of Action.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Skink Priest and any Lizardmen within 4" of him gain a save of 4+ against the effects of spells or prayers. This spell remains in play until the Skink Priest is taken Out of Action.

spells.name: Tinci’s Rage
spells.ruleFull: A single Lizardman within 6" of the Skink Priest or himself, is overtaken by rage and follows the rules for Frenzy, in addition he gains +1 Strength. This spell remains in play until the Skink Priest or the model is -Stunned- or is taken -Out of Action-. At the beginning of the turn the Skink priest must pass a Leadership roll in order to keep the spell going. Only a single model may be affected by the blessing at any given time, but the Skink Priest can choose to release the spell at the beginning of his turn if he wish to attempt to recast it on another model later in the shooting phase.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: A single Lizardman within 6" of the Skink Priest or himself, is overtaken by rage and follows the This spell remains in play until the Skink Priest or the model is -Stunned- or is taken -Out of Action-. At the beginning of the turn the Skink priest must pass a Leadership roll in order to keep the spell going. Only a single model may be affected by the blessing at any given time, but the Skink Priest can choose to release the spell at the beginning of his turn if he wish to attempt to recast it on another model later in the shooting phase.

spells.name: Itzl’s Speed
spells.ruleFull: A single Lizardman model within 6" of the Skink Priest or himself, may make an additional sprint of movement and move up to 4". This counts, as running and a model may not move if he has already fired with a missile weapon. He may not charge with this extra move.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: A single Lizardman model within 6" of the Skink Priest or himself, may make an additional sprint of movement and move up to 4". This counts, as running and a model may not move if he has already fired with a missile weapon. He may not charge with this extra move.

lore-of-darkness.name: Lore of Darkness
lore-of-darkness.flavour: It is whispered amongst the wise that the Dark Master taught the Lore of Darkness to his disciples in order to spread corruption throughout the world.

spells.name: Bolt of Dark Light
spells.flavour: The Dark Emissary conjures a bolt of malign power to smite his enemies.
spells.ruleFull: The bolt has a range of 12" and causes a single Strength 5 hit against the first model in its path.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The bolt has a range of 12" and causes a single Strength 5 hit against the first model in its path.

spells.name: Betrayal in Death
spells.flavour: Summoning all the curses of the Dark Master, the Emissary instils the vigour of the undead into a slain enemy forcing them to attack their comrades.
spells.ruleFull: This spell will affect all enemy models slain in the shooting phase or close combat and lasts until the start of the caster's next turn. The enemies will reanimate as they are killed and attack their comrades. If not in combat the model will shoot if able, or charge if it has no missile weapons. If in combat the enemy will only make a single attack. After attacking the enemy will fall once more, dead.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell will affect all enemy models slain in the shooting phase or close combat and lasts until the start of the caster's next turn. The enemies will reanimate as they are killed and attack their comrades. If not in combat the model will shoot if able, or charge if it has no missile weapons. If in combat the enemy will only make a single attack. After attacking the enemy will fall once more, dead.

spells.name: Nightmare
spells.flavour: A vision of a warrior's worst nightmares manifests before him instilling inner feelings of dread.
spells.ruleFull: This spell may be cast upon an enemy model within 18" of the caster. The model must take an immediate fear test as if charged by a fear-causing enemy. If failed the model flees 2D6" away from the Dark Emissary.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell may be cast upon an enemy model within 18" of the caster. The model must take an immediate fear test as if charged by a fear-causing enemy. If failed the model flees 2D6" away from the Dark Emissary.

spells.name: Curse of the Dark Master
spells.flavour: The Dark Emissary bas the power to enfeeble his enemies, loosening their grip on their swords and debilitating their will through the cold touch of fear.
spells.ruleFull: This spell can be cast upon a single model within 24" of the caster. All that model's rolls to hit for both shooting and combat are reduced by -1 until the start of the caster' next turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell can be cast upon a single model within 24" of the caster. All that model's rolls to hit for both shooting and combat are reduced by -1 until the start of the caster' next turn.

spells.name: Fog of Death
spells.flavour: A deep and impenetrable fog cloaks the entire battlefield, filled with the vicious embodiments of nightmares. Chaos and fear ensue.
spells.ruleFull: This spell affects every model on the board except the Dark Emissary. Enemy models are affected on a roll of 4+, while friendly models are only affected on a 6+. All models attacked by the nightmare creatures suffer a strength 2 hit. The fog lasts until the start of the caster's next turn and reduces line of sigh to 3D6" for all warriors present which will affect shooting, charging etc.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell affects every model on the board except the Dark Emissary. Enemy models are affected on a roll of 4+, while friendly models are only affected on a 6+. All models attacked by the nightmare creatures suffer a strength 2 hit. The fog lasts until the start of the caster's next turn and reduces line of sigh to 3D6" for all warriors present which will affect shooting, charging etc.

spells.name: Coils of the Serpent
spells.flavour: The Emissary conjures a dark serpent of pure malign energy to ensnare and crush an unwitting adversary in its coils.
spells.ruleFull: This spell may be cast upon a single enemy model within 6" of the caster. The model must take an immediate toughness test to fight off the deadly serpent. If failed the model is crushed to death and out of action. No saves of any kind will protect against this magic.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell may be cast upon a single enemy model within 6" of the caster. The model must take an immediate toughness test to fight off the deadly serpent. If failed the model is crushed to death and out of action. No saves of any kind will protect against this magic.

lore-of-light.name: Lore of Light
lore-of-light.flavour: Only the Truthsayers know of the strange and powerful rituals of the Lore of Light and they pass this knowledge on to a few.

spells.name: Wings of Fate
spells.flavour: Using the powers of life itself, the Truthsayer conjures a flock of birds to sweep down and attack his enemies.
spells.ruleFull: The flock has a range of 18" and may attack any model within this range of the Truthsayer. The enemy model suffers D3 Strength 2 hits.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The flock has a range of 18" and may attack any model within this range of the Truthsayer. The enemy model suffers D3 Strength 2 hits.

spells.name: Light of Battle
spells.flavour: The power of light infuses one of the Truthsayer's allies, encasing them in a protective barrier of pure light.
spells.ruleFull: This spell may be cast upon a friendly model within 12" of the caster. That model has an additional save of 5+ that can be reduced in any way against all attacks until the start of the Truthsayer's next turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell may be cast upon a friendly model within 12" of the caster. That model has an additional save of 5+ that can be reduced in any way against all attacks until the start of the Truthsayer's next turn.

spells.name: Gift of Life
spells.flavour: Life is at the essence of the Truthsayer's magic. Harnessing all of his power the Truthsayer restores a fallen comrade miraculously back to life!
spells.ruleFull: This spell may be cast upon a friendly model slain in the previous enemy turn. The model is immediately restored back to 1 wound remaining and should be placed as accurately as possible where they fell.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell may be cast upon a friendly model slain in the previous enemy turn. The model is immediately restored back to 1 wound remaining and should be placed as accurately as possible where they fell.

spells.name: Blessing of Valour
spells.flavour: The Truthsayer evokes a powerful blessing, which instils an ally with the courage and strength of the immortal hunter gods.
spells.ruleFull: This spell may be cast upon a single friendly model within 24". The model is infused with strength and courage, gaining +1 to all hit rolls in close combat for the duration of the turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell may be cast upon a single friendly model within 24". The model is infused with strength and courage, gaining +1 to all hit rolls in close combat for the duration of the turn.

spells.name: Boon of Courage
spells.flavour: A corona of reassuring energy surrounds the Truthsayer and envelops an ally with its power, instilling resolve and unshakable determination.
spells.ruleFull: This spell affects all friendly models within 12". The models are completely immune to the effects of psychology and all alone tests until the end of the Truthsayer's next turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell affects all friendly models within 12". The models are completely immune to the effects of psychology and all alone tests until the end of the Truthsayer's next turn.

spells.name: Voice of Command
spells.flavour: The booming resonance of the voice of the Truthsayer echoes across the fens and enemies quake with indecision and doubt.
spells.ruleFull: This spell affects one model within 24" of the Truthsayer. That model may do nothing in its next turn other than defend itself in combat. It may not move, shoot, attack or perform any other action.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell affects one model within 24" of the Truthsayer. That model may do nothing in its next turn other than defend itself in combat. It may not move, shoot, attack or perform any other action.

magic-of-the-horned-rat.name: Magic of the Horned Rat
magic-of-the-horned-rat.flavour: This brand of sorcery is used by the Skaven. It is a sinister form of magic which calls upon the Skaven deity, a loathsome daemonic god known as the Horned Rat.

spells.name: Warpfire
spells.flavour: A green flame leaps from the outstretched paw of the Sorcerer and burns its victims with indescribable agony.
spells.ruleFull: The spell has a range of 8", hitting the first model in its path. The spell causes D3 Strength 4 hits on its target, and one Strength 3 hit on each model within 2" of the target.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The spell has a range of 8", hitting the first model in its path. The spell causes D3 Strength 4 hits on its target, and one Strength 3 hit on each model within 2" of the target.

spells.name: Children of the Horned Rat
spells.flavour: The Sorcerer raises his paws and calls upon the Father of the Skaven to send forth his servants.
spells.ruleFull: This spell must be used before the game, and may only be used once. When cast, the spell summons D3 Giant Rats, which are placed within 6" of the Sorcerer. The Sorcerer may cast this spell successfully only once per battle, and the rats disappear after the battle. They do not count towards the maximum size of the Skaven warband.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell must be used before the game, and may only be used once. When cast, the spell summons D3 Giant Rats, which are placed within 6" of the Sorcerer. The Sorcerer may cast this spell successfully only once per battle, and the rats disappear after the battle. They do not count towards the maximum size of the Skaven warband.

spells.name: Gnawdoom
spells.flavour: The target is attacked by rats and soon is covered from head to foot in small, bleeding wounds.
spells.ruleFull: The Gnawdoom causes 2D6 Strength 1 hits on a single model within 8" of the caster.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Gnawdoom causes 2D6 Strength 1 hits on a single model within 8" of the caster.

spells.name: Black Fury
spells.flavour: With a chittering incantation the Sorcerer turns into a monstrous rat-like creature, which attacks with an insane fury.
spells.ruleFull: The Sorcerer may immediately charge any enemy model within 12" (ignoring any terrain and interposing models) and gains 2 extra Attacks and +1 Strength during this turn’s hand-to-hand combat phase only.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Sorcerer may immediately charge any enemy model within 12" (ignoring any terrain and interposing models) and gains 2 extra Attacks and +1 Strength during this turn's hand-to-hand combat phase only.

spells.name: Eye of the Warp
spells.flavour: Gaze into the eye of the warp and despair!
spells.ruleFull: All standing models in base contact with the Sorcerer must take an immediate Leadership test. If they fail, they each suffer a Strength 3 hit and must run 2D6" directly away from the Sorcerer, exactly as if they had lost their nerve when fighting against more than one opponent.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All standing models in base contact with the Sorcerer must take an immediate Leadership test. If they fail, they each suffer a Strength 3 hit and must run 2D6" directly away from the Sorcerer, exactly as if they had lost their nerve when fighting against more than one opponent.

spells.name: Sorcerer’s Curse
spells.flavour: The Sorcerer points a claw towards one of his enemies and curses him in the name of the Horned One.
spells.ruleFull: The spell has a range of 12" and affects a single model within range. The target must re-roll any successful armour saves and to hit rolls during the Skaven hand-to-hand phase and his own next shooting and hand-to-hand combat phases.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The spell has a range of 12" and affects a single model within range. The target must re-roll any successful armour saves and to hit rolls during the Skaven hand-to-hand phase and his own next shooting and hand-to-hand combat phases.

mortuary-cult-scrolls.name: Mortuary Cult Scrolls
mortuary-cult-scrolls.flavour: The Liche Priest's magic is preserved in magical scrolls that date back to Nagash's time as High Priest of the early Nehekharan civilisation.
mortuary-cult-scrolls.admonitions:
Mummy

In the original source material for Khemri, instead of Acolytes there was a hero type called "Mummy Warriors" with a very different profile and cost. Additionally, the Tomb Lord was called "Mummy Prince". There is still a remnant mention in the original Town Cryers calling the Tomb lord "Mummy" in the skill table and profile.

spells.name: Menkare's scroll of Urgency
spells.flavour: The Liche Priest reaches out to urge an Undead warrior forward.
spells.ruleFull: A single Skeleton Soldier within 6" may immediately move again up to its maximum Movement distance, ie, 4". If this takes the model into base contact with an enemy model, it counts as charging.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: A single Skeleton Soldier within 6" may immediately move again up to its maximum Movement distance, ie, 4". If this takes the model into base contact with an enemy model, it counts as charging.

spells.name: Horrebe's Curse of the Mummy
spells.flavour: The Liche Priest amplifies the curse that all mummies bear, and focuses it against a single enemy model.
spells.ruleFull: The target must be in base-to-base contact with a Mummy and within 18" of the Liche Priest. if the spell is cast successfully, the enemy model has a -1 penalty on all to hit and to wound rolls, and on all armour saves. This lasts until the stare of the next Tomb Guardian Shooting phase.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The target must be in base-to-base contact with a Mummy and within 18" of the Liche Priest. if the spell is cast successfully, the enemy model has a -1 penalty on all to hit and to wound rolls, and on all armour saves. This lasts until the stare of the next Tomb Guardian Shooting phase.

spells.name: Tawosret's Scroll of Tomb Dust
spells.flavour: The Liche Priest can command the sand around him to assault a single warrior within 12".
spells.ruleFull: The warrior is automatically -knocked down- as he chokes on the sand. This spell only affects a living model.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The warrior is automatically -knocked down- as he chokes on the sand. This spell only affects a living model.

spells.name: Neferre's Scroll of Quaking Horror
spells.flavour: The Liche Priest selects a warrior within 12" who is beset by terrible, haunting visions of his own death.
spells.ruleFull: The model must pass a Leadership test or flee 2D6" directly away from the Liche Priest. The warrior will continue to flee in each Movement phase until he makes a successful Rally test in the Recovery phase. This spell has no effect on Undead models or models that are immune to psychology.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The model must pass a Leadership test or flee 2D6" directly away from the Liche Priest. The warrior will continue to flee in each Movement phase until he makes a successful Rally test in the Recovery phase. This spell has no effect on Undead models or models that are immune to psychology.

spells.name: Merneptah's Scroll of the Scarab Song
spells.flavour: With a short, rasping chant, the Liche Priest summons a swarm of scarabs, which burrow up through the ground, and all over an enemy warrior.
spells.ruleFull: A single model within 8" of the Liche Priest suffers 2D6 Strength 1 hits. In addition, that model may not be shot at for the rest of the Tomb Guards Shooting phase, nor may he fight or be fought in hand-to-hand combat. If the model is already in hand-to-hand combat, move him 1" away from the combat as he staggers about in agony. Unless he suffers an actual injury the warrior counts as having just stood up in the next turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: A single model within 8" of the Liche Priest suffers 2D6 Strength 1 hits. In addition, that model may not be shot at for the rest of the Tomb Guards Shooting phase, nor may he fight or be fought in hand-to-hand combat. If the model is already in hand-to-hand combat, move him 1" away from the combat as he staggers about in agony. Unless he suffers an actual injury the warrior counts as having just stood up in the next turn.

spells.name: Djedre's summonation of the Vengeful Dead
spells.ruleFull: The Liche Priest may re-animate a Skeleton Soldier that went -out of action- during the last turn. Place the model anywhere within 6" of the Liche Priest, but not straight into hand-to-hand combat with an enemy model.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Liche Priest may re-animate a Skeleton Soldier that went -out of action- during the last turn. Place the model anywhere within 6" of the Liche Priest, but not straight into hand-to-hand combat with an enemy model.

necromancy.name: Necromancy
necromancy.flavour: Necromancy is the magic of the dead. It grants Necromancers the power to raise the dead and command spirits, but also destroy the vitality of the living.

spells.name: Lifestealer
spells.flavour: The Necromancer sucks out the very essence of life from his victim, stealing its vigour for himself.
spells.ruleFull: You may choose a single model within 6". The target suffers a wound (no save allowed) and the Necromancer gains an extra wound for the duration of the battle. This may take the Necromancer’s Wounds above his original maximum value. This spell will not affect the Possessed or any Undead models.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: You may choose a single model within 6". The target suffers a wound (no save allowed) and the Necromancer gains an extra wound for the duration of the battle. This may take the Necromancer's Wounds above his original maximum value. This spell will not affect the Possessed or any Undead models.

spells.name: Re-Animation
spells.flavour: At the spoken command of the Necromancer, the dead rise to fight again.
spells.ruleFull: One Zombie that went -out of action- during the last hand-to-hand combat or Shooting phase immediately returns to the battle.<sup><Tooltip content="err46">✏️</Tooltip></sup> Place the model within 6" of the Necromancer. The model cannot be placed straight into hand-to-hand combat with an enemy model.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: One Zombie that went -out of action- during the last hand-to-hand combat or Shooting phase immediately returns to the battle. Place the model within 6" of the Necromancer. The model cannot be placed straight into hand-to-hand combat with an enemy model.

spells.name: Death vision
spells.flavour: The Necromancer calls on the power of Necromancy to reveal the moment of his enemies’ death.
spells.ruleFull: The Necromancer causes fear in his enemies for the duration of the battle.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Necromancer causes fear in his enemies for the duration of the battle.

spells.name: Spell of Doom
spells.flavour: The Necromancer whispers to the sleeping dead to rise up from the ground and seize his enemies.
spells.ruleFull: Choose one enemy model within 12". The model must immediately roll equal to or less than his Strength on a D6 or the dead emerging from the earth will rend him with supernatural power. If he fails, you may roll on the Injury table to see what happens to the unfortunate warrior.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Choose one enemy model within 12". The model must immediately roll equal to or less than his Strength on a D6 or the dead emerging from the earth will rend him with supernatural power. If he fails, you may roll on the Injury table to see what happens to the unfortunate warrior.

spells.name: Call of Vanhel
spells.flavour: The Necromancer summons the world of the dead to invigorate his Undead servants.
spells.ruleFull: A single Zombie or Dire Wolf within 6" of the Necromancer may immediately move again up to its maximum Movement distance (ie, 9" in the case of Dire Wolves). If this moves them into base contact with an enemy model, they count as charging.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: A single Zombie or Dire Wolf within 6" of the Necromancer may immediately move again up to its maximum Movement distance (ie, 9" in the case of Dire Wolves). If this moves them into base contact with an enemy model, they count as charging.

spells.name: Spell of Awakening
spells.flavour: The Necromancer calls the soul of a slain Hero back to his body and enslaves him with corrupt magic.
spells.ruleFull:
If an enemy Hero is killed (ie, your opponent rolls 11-15 on the Serious Injury chart after the battle) then the Necromancer may raise him to fight as a Zombie in his servitude.

The dead Hero retains his characteristics and all his weapons and armour but may not use any other equipment or skills. He may no longer run, counts as a Henchman group on his own, and may not gain additional experience. This spell always succeeds (rules for Henchmen and experience are described later). The new Zombie❓ follows all the normal Zombie rules (immune to poison, causes fear) except for retaining his profile, weapons and armour✏️.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: If an enemy Hero is killed (ie, your opponent rolls 11-15 on the Serious Injury chart after the battle) then the Necromancer may raise him to fight as a Zombie in his servitude. The dead Hero retains his characteristics and all his weapons and armour but may not use any other equipment or skills. He may no longer run, counts as a Henchman group on his own, and may not gain additional experience. This spell always succeeds (The new Zombie follows all the normal Zombie rules (immune to poison, causes fear) except for retaining his profile, weapons and armour.

necromancy-restless-dead.name: Necromancy (The Restless Dead)
necromancy-restless-dead.notes: While they are similar, this spell list has differences to the original Necromancy list, and should only be used by The Restless Dead Liche and Necromancer.
necromancy-restless-dead.flavour: Necromancy is the magic of the dead. It grants Necromancers the power to raise the dead and command spirits, but also destroy the vitality of the living. This list is slightly revised for use in a Restless Dead Warband.

spells.name: Spell of Awakening
spells.flavour: The Sorcerer summons calls the soul of a slain Hero back to his body and enslaves him with corrupt magic.
spells.ruleFull:
If an enemy Hero is killed (i.e. your opponent rolls 11-15 on the serious injury chart after the battle), then the sorcerer may raise him to fight as a Zombie in his servitude.

The dead Hero retains his characteristics and all his weapons and armour but may not use any equipment or skills. He may no longer run, counts as a Henchmen group on his own and does not gain additional experience.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: If an enemy Hero is killed (i.e. your opponent rolls 11-15 on the serious injury chart after the battle), then the sorcerer may raise him to fight as a Zombie in his servitude. The dead Hero retains his characteristics and all his weapons and armour but may not use any equipment or skills. He may no longer run, counts as a Henchmen group on his own and does not gain additional experience.

spells.name: Lifestealer
spells.flavour: The Sorcerer sucks out the very essence of life from his victim, stealing its vigour for himself.
spells.ruleFull: Choose a single model within 6”. The target suffers a wound, (no saves allowed) and the sorcerer gains an extra wound for the duration of the battle. This may take the Wounds of a Necromancer above their original maximum value, but a Liche may only restore lost wounds. This spell will not affect the Possessed or any Undead models.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Choose a single model within 6". The target suffers a wound, (no saves allowed) and the sorcerer gains an extra wound for the duration of the battle. This may take the Wounds of a Necromancer above their original maximum value, but a Liche may only restore lost wounds. This spell will not affect the Possessed or any Undead models.

spells.name: Reanimation
spells.flavour: At the spoken command of the Sorcerer, the dead rise to fight again.
spells.ruleFull: One Zombie that went out of action during the last hand to hand combat phase immediately returns to battle. Place the model within 6” of the sorcerer. The model cannot be placed straight into hand to hand combat with an enemy model. This spell can be used on Grave Guards and Wights to restore 1 lost wound (should they have more than one). This cannot be used to bring Scarecrows, Grave Guards, Wights and Skeletons back to life if they are taken out of action the way Zombies can.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: One Zombie that went out of action during the last hand to hand combat phase immediately returns to battle. Place the model within 6" of the sorcerer. The model cannot be placed straight into hand to hand combat with an enemy model. This spell can be used on Grave Guards and Wights to restore 1 lost wound (should they have more than one). This cannot be used to bring Scarecrows, Grave Guards, Wights and Skeletons back to life if they are taken out of action the way Zombies can.

spells.name: Spell of Doom
spells.flavour: The Sorcerer whispers to the sleeping dead to rise up from the ground and seize his enemies.
spells.ruleFull: Chose one enemy model within 12”. The model must immediately roll equal to or less than his Strength on a D6 or the dead emerging from the earth will rend him with supernatural power. If he fails, you may roll on the Injury table to see what happens to the unfortunate warrior.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Chose one enemy model within 12". The model must immediately roll equal to or less than his Strength on a D6 or the dead emerging from the earth will rend him with supernatural power. If he fails, you may roll on the Injury table to see what happens to the unfortunate warrior.

spells.name: Call of Vanhel
spells.flavour: The Sorcerer summons the world of the dead to invigorate his Undead servants.
spells.ruleFull: A single Zombie, Skeleton, Wight or Grave Guard within 6” of the caster may immediately move again up to its maximum movement distance. If this moves them into base contact with an enemy model then it counts as charging. The targeted Zombie, Skeleton, Wight or Grave Guard will automatically pass Initiative tests needed to be made during this extra movement.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: A single Zombie, Skeleton, Wight or Grave Guard within 6" of the caster may immediately move again up to its maximum movement distance. If this moves them into base contact with an enemy model then it counts as charging. The targeted Zombie, Skeleton, Wight or Grave Guard will automatically pass Initiative tests needed to be made during this extra movement.

spells.name: Deathly Visage (Necromancers only)
spells.flavour: The Sorcerer calls upon the power of Necromancy to reveal the moment of his enemies’ death.
spells.ruleFull: The Necromancer causes fear in his enemies for the duration of the battle and is likewise immune to fear. This spell is the one exception to the Apprentice rule that Necromancers must usually follow when in a Liche warband. A Necromancer may choose this spell if the Liche has the spell Horror.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Necromancer causes fear in his enemies for the duration of the battle and is likewise immune to fear. This spell is the one exception to the Apprentice rule that Necromancers must usually follow when in a Liche warband. A Necromancer may choose this spell if the Liche has the spell Horror.

spells.name: Living Horror (Liche only)
spells.flavour: The ghostlights around the Liche intensify as he torments the mind of his enemy forcing him to experience the sensation during the very moment of his death over and over.
spells.ruleFull: You may choose one model within 8” of the Liche and roll D6+3. If this score is equal to or greater than the Leadership of the target model, then that model suffers a Wound, no armour saves allowed. If this wounds the target and they still have Wounds remaining, then that target may not move, shoot or cast spells during their next turn unless they pass a Leadership test. This spell will not affect the Possessed, Undead, or any model that is immune to fear.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: You may choose one model within 8" of the Liche and roll D6+3. If this score is equal to or greater than the Leadership of the target model, then that model suffers a Wound, no armour saves allowed. If this wounds the target and they still have Wounds remaining, then that target may not move, shoot or cast spells during their next turn unless they pass a Leadership test. This spell will not affect the Possessed, Undead, or any model that is immune to fear.

spells.name: Howl of the North
spells.flavour: Icy winds sweep before the Shaman knocking missiles from their path.
spells.ruleFull: The Shaman is immune to all missile fire. Roll a dice during the Shaman’s recovery phase. On a roll of 1 or 2 the winds dissipate.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Shaman is immune to all missile fire. Roll a dice during the Shaman's recovery phase. On a roll of 1 or 2 the winds dissipate.

spells.name: Angvar’s Fury
spells.flavour: The Shaman’s howls rouses the anger of the warriors around him to a fever pitch.
spells.ruleFull: All warriors within 8" of the Shaman gain a +1 to hit in hand-to-hand combat against the opposing warband. The spell lasts till the start of the Norse players next turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All warriors within 8" of the Shaman gain a +1 to hit in hand-to-hand combat against the opposing warband. The spell lasts till the start of the Norse players next turn.

spells.name: Elvek’s Cold Spear
spells.flavour: A razor sharp icicle flies at the Shaman’s foe.
spells.ruleFull: The icicle has a range of 18" and causes one S4 hit. It strikes the first model in its path. Normal armour saves apply.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The icicle has a range of 18" and causes one S4 hit. It strikes the first model in its path. Normal armour saves apply.

spells.name: Gift of the Fates
spells.flavour: The Shaman calls on the three Wyrd Sisters of Norse legend for a glimpse of the future.
