spells.ruleFull: The Shaman may adjust one die roll by +1/–1 between a successful casting of this rune and his next recovery phase. A ‘to wound’ roll adjusted to or from 6 will not cause a critical.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Shaman may adjust one die roll by +1/-1 between a successful casting of this rune and his next recovery phase. A ‘to wound' roll adjusted to or from 6 will not cause a critical.

spells.name: Kiss of Frost
spells.flavour: The Shaman covers ground of his choosing with slick ice.
spells.ruleFull: A single model within 12" of the Shaman must pass an Initiative test or be knocked down.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: A single model within 12" of the Shaman must pass an Initiative test or be knocked down.

spells.name: Bear’s Might
spells.flavour: The Shaman calls upon the spirits of the great Ice Bears of the North to aid him.
spells.ruleFull: The Shaman gains +1 Attack, +2 Strength, +2 Toughness and loses -2 Initiative (to a minimum of 1). Take a Leadership test at the beginning of each turn (both yours and your opponent’s). If the test fails, Bear’s Might drains away. Bear’s Might can only be cast successfully once per game.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Shaman gains +1 Attack, +2 Strength, +2 Toughness and loses -2 Initiative (to a minimum of 1). Take a Leadership test at the beginning of each turn (both yours and your opponent's). If the test fails, Bear's Might drains away. Bear's Might can only be cast successfully once per game.

nurgle-rituals.name: Nurgle Rituals
nurgle-rituals.flavour: The Carnival Master uses the rituals of Nurgle to pervert and corrupt nature, inflicting hideous diseases for which there are no known cures.

spells.name: Daemonic Vigour
spells.flavour: The Master imbues his Daemonic minions with supernatural power.
spells.ruleFull: Any Plague Bearers or Nurglings within 8" of the Master increase their Daemonic Aura save from 5+ to 4+ until the beginning of their next turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Any Plague Bearers or Nurglings within 8" of the Master increase their Daemonic Aura save from 5+ to 4+ until the beginning of their next turn.

spells.name: Buboes
spells.flavour: The Master bestows the gift of pus-filled buboes upon his enemies.
spells.ruleFull: This spell has a range of 8" and affects a single enemy warrior. The warrior must pass a Toughness test or lose a Wound. No Armour saves are allowed.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell has a range of 8" and affects a single enemy warrior. The warrior must pass a Toughness test or lose a Wound. No Armour saves are allowed.

spells.name: Stench of Nurgle
spells.flavour: The Master spews forth a foul, stinking mist that chokes his foes.
spells.ruleFull: This spell has a range of 6" and affects all living creatures – friend or foe. Each enemy warrior in range must pass a Toughness test or lose an Attack until their next turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell has a range of 6" and affects all living creatures - friend or foe. Each enemy warrior in range must pass a Toughness test or lose an Attack until their next turn.

spells.name: Pestilence
spells.flavour: The Master inflicts horrible diseases upon the unbelievers.
spells.ruleFull: All enemy models within 12" of the Master suffer a Strength 3 hit. No Armour saves are allowed.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All enemy models within 12" of the Master suffer a Strength 3 hit. No Armour saves are allowed.

spells.name: Scabrous Hide
spells.flavour: The Master’s skin becomes tough and leathery like that of his patron god.
spells.ruleFull: The Master has an armour save of 2+ which replaces any normal Armour save. The Scabrous Hide lasts until the beginning of his next Shooting phase.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Master has an armour save of 2+ which replaces any normal Armour save. The Scabrous Hide lasts until the beginning of his next Shooting phase.

spells.name: Nurgle’s Rot
spells.flavour: The Master bestows the blessing of the Plague God upon his foe.
spells.ruleFull: All enemy models in base contact with the Master must immediately test against their Toughness or contract Nurgle’s Rot.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All enemy models in base contact with the Master must immediately test against their Toughness or contract Nurgle's Rot.

onogal-rituals.name: Onogal Rituals

permittedWarbands.prerequisite: with the Mark of Onogal the Crow

onogal-rituals.flavour: These modified Nurgle Rituals are used by Seers with the Mark of Onogal the Crow.

spells.name: Touch of Onogal
spells.flavour: The Seer’s body is covered with smallpox and blisters. His touch can transmit devastating diseases.
spells.ruleFull: This spell can be used against one of the Seer’s close combat opponents. If he takes the model out of action in the following hand-to-hand combat phase, that player rolls for Serious Injuries immediately. If the model dies permanently, replace it with a Nurgle Plague Bearer (see Bestiary for rules) for the rest of the game under the Seer’s control.<sup><Tooltip content="err107">✏️</Tooltip></sup> If the Seer is stunned or taken out of action the Plague Bearer disappears into the Realm of Chaos. Note that only one Plague Bearer can be created at a time.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell can be used against one of the Seer's close combat opponents. If he takes the model out of action in the following hand-to-hand combat phase, that player rolls for Serious Injuries immediately. If the model dies permanently, replace it with a Nurgle Plague Bearer (see Bestiary for rules) for the rest of the game under the Seer's control. If the Seer is stunned or taken out of action the Plague Bearer disappears into the Realm of Chaos. Note that only one Plague Bearer can be created at a time.

spells.flavour: The Master bestows the gift of pus-filled buboes upon his enemies.
spells.ruleFull: This spell has a range of 8" and affects a single enemy warrior. The warrior must pass a Toughness test or lose a Wound. No Armour saves are allowed.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell has a range of 8" and affects a single enemy warrior. The warrior must pass a Toughness test or lose a Wound. No Armour saves are allowed.

spells.ruleFull: This spell has a range of 6" and affects all living creatures – friend or foe. Each enemy warrior in range must pass a Toughness test or lose an Attack until their next turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell has a range of 6" and affects all living creatures - friend or foe. Each enemy warrior in range must pass a Toughness test or lose an Attack until their next turn.

spells.ruleFull: All enemy models within 12" of the Master suffer a Strength 3 hit. No Armour saves are allowed.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All enemy models within 12" of the Master suffer a Strength 3 hit. No Armour saves are allowed.

spells.name: Scabrous Hide
spells.flavour: The Master’s skin becomes tough and leathery like that of his patron god.
spells.ruleFull: The Master has an armour save of 2+ which replaces any normal Armour save. The Scabrous Hide lasts until the beginning of his next Shooting phase.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Master has an armour save of 2+ which replaces any normal Armour save. The Scabrous Hide lasts until the beginning of his next Shooting phase.

spells.name: Nurgle’s Rot
spells.flavour: The Master bestows the blessing of the Plague God upon his foe.
spells.ruleFull: All enemy models in base contact with the Master must immediately test against their Toughness or contract Nurgle’s Rot (see Nurgle’s Rot).
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All enemy models in base contact with the Master must immediately test against their Toughness or contract Nurgle's Rot (see Nurgle's Rot).

prayers-of-sigmar.name: Prayers of Sigmar
prayers-of-sigmar.notes: A warrior may use the divine power of Sigmar while wearing armour. Prayers of Sigmar are not regarded as spells, so any special protection against spells does not affect them.
prayers-of-sigmar.flavour: Those with great faith in the gods can call upon their divine power. The priests of Sigmar can pray for many miracles: healing of wounds, strengthening the resolve of their comrades or the banishment of Daemonic creatures and the Undead.

spells.name: The Hammer of Sigmar
spells.flavour: This weapon of the faithful glows with a golden light, imbued as it is with the righteous power of Sigmar.
spells.ruleFull: The wielder gains +2 Strength in hand-to-hand combat and all hits he inflicts cause double damage (eg, 2 wounds instead of 1). The Priest must test each shooting phase he wants to use the Hammer.<sup><Tooltip content="faq90">❓</Tooltip></sup>
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The wielder gains +2 Strength in hand-to-hand combat and all hits he inflicts cause double damage. The Priest must test each shooting phase he wants to use the Hammer.

spells.name: Hearts of Steel
spells.flavour: As the three words of power are spoken, waves of glory surround the servant of Sigmar. The faithful are heartened by the warrior god’s presence.
spells.ruleFull: Any allied warriors within 8" of the warrior become immune to fear and all alone tests. IN addition, the whole warband gains +1 to any Rout tests they have to make. The effects of this spell last until the caster is knocked down, stunned or put out of action. If cast again the effects are not cumulative, ie, the maximum bonus to Rout tests remains +1❓✏️.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Any allied warriors within 8" of the warrior become immune to fear and all alone tests. IN addition, the whole warband gains +1 to any Rout tests they have to make. The effects of this spell last until the caster is knocked down, stunned or put out of action. If cast again the effects are not cumulative, ie, the maximum bonus to Rout tests remains +1.

spells.name: Soulfire
spells.flavour: The wrath of Sigmar comes to earth. Purifying flames surround the Priest and wipe out those who resist the righteous fury of the God-Emperor!
spells.ruleFull: All enemy models within 4" of the servant of Sigmar suffer a Strength 3 hit. No armour saves are allowed. The servants of darkness and Chaos are especially susceptible to Sigmar’s holy power. Undead and Possessed models in range suffer a Strength 5 hit instead.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All enemy models within 4" of the servant of Sigmar suffer a Strength 3 hit. No armour saves are allowed. The servants of darkness and Chaos are especially susceptible to Sigmar's holy power. Undead and Possessed models in range suffer a Strength 5 hit instead.

spells.name: Shield of Faith
spells.flavour: A shield of pure white light appears in front of the Priest. As long as his faith remains strong the shield will protect him.
spells.ruleFull: The Priest is immune to all spells. Roll at the beginning of each turn in the recovery phase. On a roll of 1 or 2 the shield disappears.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Priest is immune to all spells. Roll at the beginning of each turn in the recovery phase. On a roll of 1 or 2 the shield disappears.

spells.name: Healing Hand
spells.flavour: Laying hands upon a wounded comrade, the servant of Sigmar calls upon his Lord to heal the warrior’s wounds.
spells.ruleFull: Any one model within 2" of the Priest (including himself) may be healed. The warrior is restored to his full quota of Wounds. In addition, if any friendly models within 2" are stunned or knocked down, they immediately come to their senses, stand up, and continue fighting as normal.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Any one model within 2" of the Priest (including himself) may be healed. The warrior is restored to his full quota of Wounds. In addition, if any friendly models within 2" are stunned or knocked down, they immediately come to their senses, stand up, and continue fighting as normal.

spells.name: Armour of Righteousness
spells.flavour: Impenetrable armour covers the Priest and the fiery image of a twin-tailed comet burns above his head.
spells.ruleFull:
The Priest has an armour save of 2+ which replaces his normal armour save. In addition, he causes fear in his enemies and is therefore immune to fear himself.

The power of the Armour of Righteousness lasts until the beginning of the Priest’s next Shooting phase.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Priest has an armour save of 2+ which replaces his normal armour save. In addition, he causes fear in his enemies and is therefore immune to fear himself. The power of the Armour of Righteousness lasts until the beginning of the Priest's next Shooting phase.

prayers-of-taal.name: Prayers of Taal
prayers-of-taal.notes: Prayers of Taal work like Prayers of Sigmar although the Taal Priest never wears armour.
prayers-of-taal.flavour: Taal is the God of Nature and demands the respect of all those who enter the wild regions of the Empire. He is portrayed as a tall, broad-shouldered man with long wild and thick beard. He wears a stag skull as a helm and is clothed in bison and bear skins. He is often called the Lord of Beasts. His followers include rangers, trappers and those who live in the wilds of the Empire.
prayers-of-taal.admonitions:
Armour

Though the above states the priest doesn't wear "armour", the unit entry for the Priest clarifies this only applies to Heavy Armour, so they can wear Light Armour, Helmets, and Shields as portrayed in their lore above.

spells.name: Stag’s Leap
spells.flavour: Many of Taal’s priests wear a stag skull as a symbol of their devotion and the Forest Lord’s power can be used to emulate the speed and beauty of this magnificent beast.
spells.ruleFull: The Priest of Taal may immediately move anywhere within 9" including into base contact with the enemy, in which case he counts as charging and gains a +1 Strength to his first round of attacks. If he engages a fleeing enemy, in the close combat phase he will score one automatic hit at +1 Strength and then his opponent will flee again (if he survives).
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Priest of Taal may immediately move anywhere within 9" including into base contact with the enemy, in which case he counts as charging and gains a +1 Strength to his first round of attacks. If he engages a fleeing enemy, in the close combat phase he will score one automatic hit at +1 Strength and then his opponent will flee again (if he survives).

spells.name: Blessed Ale
spells.flavour: Like his brother Ulric, Taal has a great appetite for the strong ales of the Northern Empire. During the summer Equinox, each village in Ostland opens one keg of ale (at least!) in Taal's honour.
spells.ruleFull: Drinking a flask of Taal-blessed ale (the priest is assumed to carry as many flasks as are needed) may heal any one model within 2" of the Priest (including himself). The warrior is restored to his full quota of Wounds. In addition, any living enemy models (not Undead or Possessed) within 2" of the Priest will lose 1 Attack during the next round of combat due to the potent fumes of the ale.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Drinking a flask of Taal-blessed ale (the priest is assumed to carry as many flasks as are needed) may heal any one model within 2" of the Priest (including himself). The warrior is restored to his full quota of Wounds. In addition, any living enemy models (not Undead or Possessed) within 2" of the Priest will lose 1 Attack during the next round of combat due to the potent fumes of the ale.

spells.name: Bear's Paw
spells.flavour: Many an armoured knight has been knocked to the ground by the surprising Strength of the followers of Taal. Although traditionally called ‘Bear’s Paw’ this spell is sometimes referred to as ‘Moose’s Breath’ by those Ostlander’s who have felt its power.
spells.ruleFull: The Priest invokes the blessing of Taal on himself or a single friendly model within 6". The target receives a bonus of +2 to his Strength until the Priest’s next turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Priest invokes the blessing of Taal on himself or a single friendly model within 6". The target receives a bonus of +2 to his Strength until the Priest's next turn.

spells.name: Earthshudder
spells.flavour: Taal’s domain includes both the earth and the skies and his power can reach out even into the dark streets of Mordheim. When his name is invoked three times and the blood of an eagle is poured on the ground, the Lord of the Wild will cause thunder to rumble and the earth to shake.
spells.ruleFull: The spell is cast on a single building within 4". Any enemy models touching the building will suffer a single S3 hit. In addition the building will collapse and any models on it will count as having fallen to the ground (for example a model falling 5" to the tabletop must pass two Initiative tests to avoid taking D3 S5 hits.) Remove the terrain feature from the board for the rest of the game.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The spell is cast on a single building within 4". Any enemy models touching the building will suffer a single S3 hit. In addition the building will collapse and any models on it will count as having fallen to the ground Remove the terrain feature from the board for the rest of the game.

spells.name: Tanglefoot
spells.flavour: It is said that when Taal walked the earth, living things would spring up behind him as he passed. A portion of his power can be summoned by his followers to help regrow forests and aid in the return of the land to its natural state.
spells.ruleFull: Plants, vines and even small trees burst forth from the earth, hindering all those who attempt to move through them. All models (friend as well as foe) with the exception of Ostlander Jaeger, and friendly Horned Hunter Zealots within 12" of the Priest can only move at 1/2 speed until the next shooting phase.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Plants, vines and even small trees burst forth from the earth, hindering all those who attempt to move through them. All models (friend as well as foe) with the exception of Ostlander Jaeger, and friendly Horned Hunter Zealots within 12" of the Priest can only move at 1/2 speed until the next shooting phase.

spells.name: Summon Squirrels
spells.flavour: Taal is the master of all beasts both great and small. Those who anger him may be mauled by a mountain lion or drowned in a flood caused by an angry beaver.
spells.ruleFull: With this spell the Priest invokes the wrath of the Lord of Beasts, summoning forth dozens upon dozens of enraged squirrels. The furious rodents assault one enemy within 12" of the Priest, crawling inside the warrior’s clothing and armour, pelting him with nuts and causing numerous tiny bites and welts. The target suffers 2D6 Strength 1 hits. No armour saves allowed.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: With this spell the Priest invokes the wrath of the Lord of Beasts, summoning forth dozens upon dozens of enraged squirrels. The furious rodents assault one enemy within 12" of the Priest, crawling inside the warrior's clothing and armour, pelting him with nuts and causing numerous tiny bites and welts. The target suffers 2D6 Strength 1 hits. No armour saves allowed.

prayers-of-ulric.name: Prayers of Ulric
prayers-of-ulric.notes: Wolf Priests mav use a wolf cloak and still chant these prayers. They are prayers, not spells, and thus any special protection against spells does not affect them.
prayers-of-ulric.flavour: In a similar way to Sigmarite Sisters and Warrior-Priests and their prayers to Sigmar, Wolf Priests call upon their god for assistance in times of battle.

spells.name: Snow Squall
spells.flavour: Ulric extends his protection to the Wolf Priest in the form of a localised snow squall that engulfs the model.
spells.ruleFull: All enemy models in Hand-to-Hand combat with the priest are at -1 to hit due to the swirling snow and winds. The spell lasts for the duration of the Hand-to-Hand combat.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All enemy models in Hand-to-Hand combat with the priest are at -1 to hit due to the swirling snow and winds. The spell lasts for the duration of the Hand-to-Hand combat.

spells.name: Hammerschlag
spells.flavour: The Wolf Priest calls down a hammer blow from Ulric on any model within 6".
spells.ruleFull: That model suffers a S4 attack from an enormous ethereal hammer, including the concussion special rule.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: That model suffers a S4 attack from an enormous ethereal hammer, including the concussion special rule.

spells.name: Bloodlust
spells.flavour: The Wolf Priest is infused with a lust for battle and attacks wildly.
spells.ruleFull: All attacks are at S + 2, and he scores a critical hit on a 5-6. The Wolf Priest must test, by rolling the prayer's difficulty or greater on 2d6, each turn to see if the prayer remains in effect.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All attacks are at S + 2, and he scores a critical hit on a 5-6. The Wolf Priest must test, by rolling the prayer's difficulty or greater on 2d6, each turn to see if the prayer remains in effect.

spells.name: Wolf's Hunger
spells.ruleFull: One member of the warband (priest's choice) is thrown into a Frenzy.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: One member of the warband (priest's choice) is thrown into a Frenzy.

spells.name: Ulric's Howl
spells.flavour: The Wolf Priest's prayer is answered as an ear-shattering inhuman howl roars from his throat.
spells.ruleFull: For the duration of the battle, all members of the priest's warband are immune to Fear and all alone tests as they feel the presence of their god. Additionally, all Rout tests are at +1.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: For the duration of the battle, all members of the priest's warband are immune to Fear and all alone tests as they feel the presence of their god. Additionally, all Rout tests are at +1.

spells.name: Call of Ulric
spells.ruleFull:
The Wolf Priest lets out a cry of agony as his body re-shapes itself into that of a huge, slavering wolf with the following profile:

ProfileMWSBSSTWIALd
Wolf640441526


During the time that the priest is in the form of a wolf, he may do nothing but attack as a wolf: no spell-casting or weapons use. He still hates Sigmar's minions though.

In each shooting phase, the priest may choose to make a Leadership test (using the Wolfs Ld 6) to regain his human form. If he is still in wolf form at the end of the battle, he gets one last chance to return to human form. If he does not, then he remains a wolf forever! He is still a hero, and thus entitled to XP gains and attribute increases. He may only choose skills from the Speed Table, with the exception of Scale Sheer Surfaces.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Wolf Priest lets out a cry of agony as his body re-shapes itself into that of a huge, slavering wolf with the following profile: Wolf | 6 | 4 | 0 | 4 | 4 | 1 | 5 | 2 | 6 During the time that the priest is in the form of a wolf, he may do nothing but attack as a wolf: no spell-casting or weapons use. He still hates Sigmar's minions though. In each shooting phase, the priest may choose to make a Leadership test (using the Wolfs Ld 6) to regain his human form. If he is still in wolf form at the end of the battle, he gets one last chance to return to human form. If he does not, then he remains a wolf forever! He is still a hero, and thus entitled to XP gains and attribute increases. He may only choose skills from the Speed Table, with the exception of Scale Sheer Surfaces.
spells.admonitions:
Maximum characteristics

ProfileMWSBSSTWIALd
Wolf760443737

rituals-of-hashut.name: Rituals of Hashut
rituals-of-hashut.flavour: This is dark sorcery of fire and ash used by wicked Sorcerers among the Chaos Dwarfs. They are Priests and magicians who have carefully mastered the teachings of a daemonic god known as the Father of Darkness.

spells.name: Sacrificial Ritual
spells.flavour: The Chaos Dwarf Sorcerer sacrifices the captives in a bloody ritual, thus carrying out his assignments as a High Priest of Hashut.
spells.ruleFull: The Chaos Dwarf Sorcerer must be in contact with an Engine of Chaos in order to successfully cast this spell. As the ritual requires the sacrifice of a mortal, remove one captive model from the Engine of Chaos and its starting warband’s roster. The Sorcerer may sacrifice additional captives to lower the spell's difficulty by –1 per sacrifice. These models must be sacrificed before rolling for Difficulty. The Chaos Dwarf Sorcerer gains +D3 Experience.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Chaos Dwarf Sorcerer must be in contact with an Engine of Chaos in order to successfully cast this spell. As the ritual requires the sacrifice of a mortal, remove one captive model from the Engine of Chaos and its starting warband's roster. The Sorcerer may sacrifice additional captives to lower the spell's difficulty by -1 per sacrifice. These models must be sacrificed before rolling for Difficulty. The Chaos Dwarf Sorcerer gains +D3 Experience.

spells.name: Spirit of Hashut
spells.flavour: The air around the Sorcerer thickens to form a billowing avatar of the great Bull-God. In defiance this unholy likeness to the Father of Darkness rolls forward, trampling all before it.
spells.ruleFull: The player draws a line 18” from the Sorcerer. All models crossed by the line, suffer one S4 hit.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The player draws a line 18" from the Sorcerer. All models crossed by the line, suffer one S4 hit.

spells.name: Bellow of Doom
spells.flavour: Crackling with arcane energy, the Sorcerer's features contort into the horned visage of the mighty Hashut. Smoke and flame spills from his maw, as he lets loose a deafening sound that none may escape.
spells.ruleFull: All models engaged in base contact with the sorcerer must make an immediate Ld test or break from combat and run.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All models engaged in base contact with the sorcerer must make an immediate Ld test or break from combat and run.

spells.name: Fumes of Azgorh
spells.flavour: The Sorcerer's mouth glows. Clouds of black gas are slowly emitted until with an almighty belch, a wave of corrosive smoke erupts from his gaping jaws.
spells.ruleFull: The spell has a range of 8", hitting all models in its path on a D6 score of 4+. Any model hit suffers a S4 hit, roll to wound as normal. No armour saves allowed.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The spell has a range of 8", hitting all models in its path on a D6 score of 4+. Any model hit suffers a S4 hit, roll to wound as normal. No armour saves allowed.

spells.name: Flickering Hide
spells.flavour: With eldritch power the target begins to burn from within. His skin spits and sparks wherever a blow is struck as if like molten iron.
spells.ruleFull: The Sorcerer may cast this spell upon himself or any one model within 6”. The flaming hide will negate any one wound suffered on a D6 roll of 4+. In hand-to-hand combat, any model which hits the flaming hide will suffer one S3 hit for each hit scored. The Flaming Hide lasts until the beginning of the Sorcerer’s next shooting phase.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Sorcerer may cast this spell upon himself or any one model within 6". The flaming hide will negate any one wound suffered on a D6 roll of 4+. In hand-to-hand combat, any model which hits the flaming hide will suffer one S3 hit for each hit scored. The Flaming Hide lasts until the beginning of the Sorcerer's next shooting phase.

spells.name: Lava Flow
spells.flavour: The Sorcerer melts into molten magma, burning itself into the earth. The Sorcerer then reappears after seeping unnaturally through the ground.
spells.ruleFull: The Sorcerer may move 12” in any direction, even into combat, counting as a charge. However, due to the nature of this spell the Sorcerer may only reappear on or below the ground.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Sorcerer may move 12" in any direction, even into combat, counting as a charge. However, due to the nature of this spell the Sorcerer may only reappear on or below the ground.

spells.name: Earthquake
spells.flavour: Arms raised, the Sorcerer brings his staff crashing to the ground. The earth ripples outwards from the blow, and splits asunder.
spells.ruleFull: All models within 3” of the Sorcerer, friend or foe alike, must roll equal to or under their Initiative or suffer D3 S4 hits.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All models within 3" of the Sorcerer, friend or foe alike, must roll equal to or under their Initiative or suffer D3 S4 hits.

shadow-warrior-magic.name: Shadow Warrior Magic
shadow-warrior-magic.flavour: Shadow Weavers use a strange blend of magic that differs in many ways to the traditional High Magic of their cousins of the Tower of Hoeth.
shadow-warrior-magic.notes: Author’s note: Several of the following spells mention that the target must be within a certain distance of a wall. This is not literally restricted to walls, but may include any piece of terrain that could be expected to cast a man-sized shadow.

spells.name: Pool of Shadow
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The spell fills the area around the mage with twisting shadows. The mage and all models within 6" may Hide as if there were a wall or obstruction between them and their enemies. They may Hide even after marching. If an enemy enters the area the effect is disrupted. While the spell lasts all affected models count as being in cover against enemy shooting. The spell lasts until the start of the Shadow Weaver's next turn.
spells.ruleFull:
The spell fills the area around the mage with twisting shadows. The mage and all models within 6" may Hide as if there were a wall or obstruction between them and their enemies. They may Hide even after marching.

If an enemy enters the area the effect is disrupted. While the spell lasts all affected models count as being in cover against enemy shooting. The spell lasts until the start of the Shadow Weaver’s next turn.

spells.name: The Living Shadows
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Shadow Weaver may cast this spell at any enemy model within 12" and within 2" of a wall. The target suffers a single Strength 4 hit with no armour saves.
spells.ruleFull: The Shadow Weaver may cast this spell at any enemy model within 12" and within 2" of a wall. The target suffers a single Strength 4 hit with no armour saves.

spells.name: Wings of Night
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell may only be cast if the Shadow Weaver is within 2" of a wall. He is instantly moved up to 12" to a position that is also within 2" of a wall. If the move places him into base contact with an enemy model he counts as charging in the first round of combat.
spells.ruleFull:
This spell may only be cast if the Shadow Weaver is within 2" of a wall. He is instantly moved up to 12" to a position that is also within 2" of a wall.

If the move places him into base contact with an enemy model he counts as charging in the first round of combat.

spells.name: Cloak of Darkness
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Shadow Weaver is concealed from enemy sight. As long as he does not attack enemy models (cast spells, shoot, or fight in close combat) he may not be attacked. He may intercept as normal if desired, but he is not required to do so. If he does not intercept, enemies may charge past him. The spell lasts until the Shadow Weaver attacks an enemy model. A model engaged in close combat may never choose not to attack.
spells.ruleFull:
The Shadow Weaver is concealed from enemy sight. As long as he does not attack enemy models (cast spells, shoot, or fight in close combat) he may not be attacked.

He may intercept as normal if desired, but he is not required to do so. If he does not intercept, enemies may charge past him. The spell lasts until the Shadow Weaver attacks an enemy model.

A model engaged in close combat may never choose not to attack.

spells.name: Shadowbind
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Shadow Weaver may cast this spell at any enemy model within 24" and within 2" of a wall. The target may not move unless it first passes a Strength test on 1D6+1<sup><Tooltip content="err133">✏️</Tooltip></sup> at the start of its turn before the Recovery phase. The spell lasts until the Shadow Weaver suffers a wound or attempts to cast another spell. If the affected model is attacked, treat it exactly as if it were Stunned.
spells.ruleFull:
The Shadow Weaver may cast this spell at any enemy model within 24" and within 2" of a wall.

The target may not move unless it first passes a Strength test on 1D6+1✏️ at the start of its turn before the Recovery phase.

The spell lasts until the Shadow Weaver suffers a wound or attempts to cast another spell. If the affected model is attacked, treat it exactly as if it were Stunned.

spells.name: Shield of Shadow
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Shadow Weaver may cast this spell on himself or a member of his warband within 12". The target gains a 5+ armour save that is not modified by the attacker's Strength. The spell lasts until the start of the Shadow Weaver's next turn.
spells.ruleFull:
The Shadow Weaver may cast this spell on himself or a member of his warband within 12".

The target gains a 5+ armour save that is not modified by the attacker’s Strength. The spell lasts until the start of the Shadow Weaver’s next turn.

shornaal-rituals.name: Shornaal Rituals

permittedWarbands.prerequisite: with the Mark of Shornaal the Serpent

shornaal-rituals.flavour: The Shornaal Rituals are used by the Seers who worship the Great Serpent. They use their power The Shornaal Rituals are used by the Seers who worship the Great Serpent. They use their power to show unlucky victims the horrible pleasures of their patron.

spells.name: Delicious Suffering
spells.flavour: The Seer summons great suffering to overwhelm his enemies.
spells.ruleFull: All models (friend and foe, except for the Seer) within 3” must pass a Ld test or are knocked down.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All models (friend and foe, except for the Seer) within 3" must pass a Ld test or are knocked down.

spells.name: Dance of the Serpent
spells.flavour: The Seer’s sight is so incredibly fascinating that his opponents cannot help starring stupidly while he draws his sword.
spells.ruleFull:
All enemy models that are not immune to psychology suffer a –1 ‘to hit’ against him in close combat.

The Dance lasts until the beginning of the Seer’s next shooting phase. |
spells.ruleAbbreviated: All enemy models that are not immune to psychology suffer a -1 ‘to hit' against him in close combat. The Dance lasts until the beginning of the Seer's next shooting phase.

spells.name: Endless Torment
spells.flavour: The Seer falls into ecstasy torturing his helpless victim and watching it die slowly.
spells.ruleFull: Choose one enemy model within 8”. From now on the model must roll for injury –1 after it’s Recovery phase. For the duration of the Torment the Seer can do nothing else but end the spell at the beginning of his turn and if attacked in close combat, he is hit automatically and the spell breaks.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Choose one enemy model within 8". From now on the model must roll for injury -1 after it's Recovery phase. For the duration of the Torment the Seer can do nothing else but end the spell at the beginning of his turn and if attacked in close combat, he is hit automatically and the spell breaks.

spells.name: Mystify
spells.flavour: Pain, beautiful Pain!” – last words of Snaghel, Exalted Seer of the Tribe of the Snake
spells.ruleFull: Target enemy model within 8" will have their Initiative value reduced to 1 and will always strike last in close combat, even if they charge an opponent or are armed with a spear or pike and are charged themselves. This spell lasts until the target passes a Ld test during the recovery phase.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Target enemy model within 8" will have their Initiative value reduced to 1 and will always strike last in close combat, even if they charge an opponent or are armed with a spear or pike and are charged themselves. This spell lasts until the target passes a Ld test during the recovery phase.

spells.name: A Thousand Voices
spells.flavour: A thousand voices manifest within the head of the unlucky victim driving him insane by mocking at his secret desires and dreams.
spells.ruleFull:
Choose one enemy model within 12”. For the duration of the spell the model reduces it’s Ld by D3 +1 (to a minimum of 2) if it is not immune to psychology.

The model must pass a Ld test at the beginning of it’s turn to end the spell. The spell breaks also when the Seer loses a wound. A thousand Voices can only enchant one model at a time.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Choose one enemy model within 12". For the duration of the spell the model reduces it's Ld by D3 +1 (to a minimum of 2) if it is not immune to psychology. The model must pass a Ld test at the beginning of it's turn to end the spell. The spell breaks also when the Seer loses a wound. A thousand Voices can only enchant one model at a time.

spells.name: Shornaal’s Temptation
spells.flavour: The Serpent has chosen to deliver a certain warrior from his miserable existence by promoting him to one of his Daemonic servants.
spells.ruleFull: Choose one enemy model within 8” that is not immune to psychology. The model must pass a Ld test. If the model fails, then the Seer gains control over the model. The player may attempt to regain control at the beginning of his turn by passing a Ld test. Shornaal's Temptation can only enchant one model at a time. If the Seer is hit whether by a missile or in close combat he must pass a Ld test or the spell ends.<sup><Tooltip content="faq15">❓</Tooltip></sup>
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Choose one enemy model within 8" that is not immune to psychology. The model must pass a Ld test. If the model fails, then the Seer gains control over the model. The player may attempt to regain control at the beginning of his turn by passing a Ld test. Shornaal's Temptation can only enchant one model at a time. If the Seer is hit whether by a missile or in close combat he must pass a Ld test or the spell ends.

spells.name: Divination of Shirath
spells.flavour: Looking into the mists of the future, the Mage divines his best move.
spells.ruleFull: The Mage may re-roll all his failed dice rolls, though the second result stands. The effect lasts until the beginning of the Mage’s next turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Mage may re-roll all his failed dice rolls, though the second result stands. The effect lasts until the beginning of the Mage's next turn.

spells.name: Shimmering Shield
spells.flavour: The Mage is surrounded by a pale glow.
spells.ruleFull: This spell acts as a shield to protect the Mage. It gives him an additional unmodified 5+ save against all attacks. The effect lasts until the beginning of the Mage’s next turn.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell acts as a shield to protect the Mage. It gives him an additional unmodified 5+ save against all attacks. The effect lasts until the beginning of the Mage's next turn.

spells.name: Statue of Light
spells.flavour: A pillar of light transfixes the Mage as another stabs down from the heavens to pin his target.
spells.ruleFull: The Mage chooses a single enemy model he can see. That model may not move as long as the Mage remains both static and alive. The Mage and the target may cast spells normally, but fight in close combat at -2 WS (minimum of 1).
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Mage chooses a single enemy model he can see. That model may not move as long as the Mage remains both static and alive. The Mage and the target may cast spells normally, but fight in close combat at -2 WS (minimum of 1).

spells.name: Fleeting Shadows
spells.flavour: The Mage slips between worlds, shimmering in and out of existence and becoming hard to pinpoint exactly.
spells.ruleFull: The first time the Mage is hit in close combat or shooting, the spell protects him and the hit is ignored. Move the Mage 2" from his current position in a random direction (but not off a cliff, etc). This is where he really was all along. The spell remains in play until it saves the Mage from a hit, whereupon it is dispelled. It may not be cast again whilst it is in play.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The first time the Mage is hit in close combat or shooting, the spell protects him and the hit is ignored. Move the Mage 2" from his current position in a random direction (but not off a cliff, etc). This is where he really was all along. The spell remains in play until it saves the Mage from a hit, whereupon it is dispelled. It may not be cast again whilst it is in play.

spells.name: Hunter’s Fury
spells.flavour: The Mage gestures at the target, and glowing arrows shoot from his fingertips to fly at the foe.
spells.ruleFull: The spell summons D3+1 arrows which the Mage can use to shoot against one enemy model following the rules for normal shooting. The arrows have a range of 36". Use the Mage’s own Ballistic Skill to determine whether he hits or not, but ignore movement, range and cover penalties. Each arrow causes one S3 hit.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The spell summons D3+1 arrows which the Mage can use to shoot against one enemy model following the The arrows have a range of 36". Use the Mage's own Ballistic Skill to determine whether he hits or not, but ignore movement, range and cover penalties. Each arrow causes one S3 hit.

spells.name: Silent Guardian
spells.flavour: Glowing swords appear by the Mage, leaping to his defence if he is attacked in close combat.
spells.ruleFull: This spell acts as an invisible guardian that will defend the Mage. If the Mage is attacked in close combat then the guardian will fight first with WS5, S3. The guardian will make 1 attack per turn against each enemy that attacks the Mage. The guardian will not leave the Mage’s side, and will only fight if the Mage himself is being attacked. The Guardian cannot be attacked in return and will only be dispelled if the Mage casts another spell or dies.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell acts as an invisible guardian that will defend the Mage. If the Mage is attacked in close combat then the guardian will fight first with WS5, S3. The guardian will make 1 attack per turn against each enemy that attacks the Mage. The guardian will not leave the Mage's side, and will only fight if the Mage himself is being attacked. The Guardian cannot be attacked in return and will only be dispelled if the Mage casts another spell or dies.

tchar-rituals.name: Tchar Rituals

permittedWarbands.prerequisite: with the Mark of Tchar the Eagle

tchar-rituals.flavour: The Tchar Rituals are used by the Seers who worship the Great Eagle. For Tchar is the Lord over destiny and fate, respecting wisdom and subtlety his servants are amongst the mightiest of spell-casters and his magic is especially effective against the dumb and inexperienced.

spells.name: Tchar’s Blessing
spells.flavour: The Seer prays to his god to fill him with wisdom and thus triumph over his enemies.
spells.ruleFull: This spell must be used before the game and may only be used once. The Seer may not cast spells in the following battle. After the game he gains D3 Experience points if he wasn’t taken out of action.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell must be used before the game and may only be used once. The Seer may not cast spells in the following battle. After the game he gains D3 Experience points if he wasn't taken out of action.

spells.name: Dispel Magic
spells.flavour: The winds of magic are bound to the will of Tchar and no so-called wizard may use them against his favoured.
spells.ruleFull: The Seer ends all effects of currently active spells.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Seer ends all effects of currently active spells.

spells.name: Foresight
spells.flavour: The Changer of the Ways pulls the strings of destiny to protect his servants.
spells.ruleFull: This spell must be used before the game and may only be used once. Choose a warband. One randomly determined Hero of that warband must miss the following game. Models that are capable of casting spells or prayers are immune to this effect.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell must be used before the game and may only be used once. Choose a warband. One randomly determined Hero of that warband must miss the following game. Models that are capable of casting spells or prayers are immune to this effect.

spells.name: Wrath of the Great Eagle
spells.flavour: The Seer calls Tchar to punish the ignorant and stupid for their delusion.
spells.ruleFull: Choose one enemy model within 12”. The model is hit with a Strength equal to the difference of the Seer’s Experience points and the model’s Experience (to a maximum of 10). Armour saves are taken as normal. If the victim has more Experience points than the Seer, the latter is hit instead.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Choose one enemy model within 12". The model is hit with a Strength equal to the difference of the Seer's Experience points and the model's Experience (to a maximum of 10). Armour saves are taken as normal. If the victim has more Experience points than the Seer, the latter is hit instead.

spells.name: Tchar’s Reward
spells.flavour: The Seer is rewarded for his great power.
spells.ruleFull:
The Seer gets +1 on any one stat per 10 Experience points he has. Each stat may be increased only once through this spell.❓

The power of Tchar’s Reward lasts until the end of the Seer’s next shooting phase and can be re-cast in that phase.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The Seer gets +1 on any one stat per 10 Experience points he has. Each stat may be increased only once through this spell. The power of Tchar's Reward lasts until the end of the Seer's next shooting phase and can be re-cast in that phase.

spells.name: Slave to Chaos
spells.flavour: From the Seer’s trembling fingers a blazing pink and blue ray streams towards an enemy causing him to mutate terribly until a new recruit queues in the ranks of the Great Eagle’s followers.
spells.ruleFull: This spell has a range of 12” and causes one Strength 2 hit with no armour save. If the model is taken out of action roll for Serious Injuries immediately. If they die replace the killed warrior with a Horror of Tzeentch (see Bestiary for rules) until the end of the game. If the Seer is stunned or taken out of action the Horror disappears into the Realm of Chaos.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: This spell has a range of 12" and causes one Strength 2 hit with no armour save. If the model is taken out of action roll for Serious Injuries immediately. If they die replace the killed warrior with a Horror of Tzeentch (see Bestiary for rules) until the end of the game. If the Seer is stunned or taken out of action the Horror disappears into the Realm of Chaos.

waaaagh.name: Waaaagh! Magic
waaaagh.flavour: Waaagh! spells are used by Orc Shamans. They are rituals of a sort, howling prayers to the boisterous Orc gods Gork and Mork.

spells.name: Led’z go
spells.flavour: The Shaman’s howling invigorates the ladz to fight even harder for Gork and Mork.
spells.ruleFull: Any Orc or Goblin within 4" of the Shaman will automatically strike first in hand-to-hand combat regardless of other circumstances. The spell only lasts until the caster is knocked down, stunned or taken out of action.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Any Orc or Goblin within 4" of the Shaman will automatically strike first in hand-to-hand combat regardless of other circumstances. The spell only lasts until the caster is knocked down, stunned or taken out of action.

spells.name: Oi! Gerroff!
spells.flavour: A huge, green ectoplasmic hand pushes an enemy away.
spells.ruleFull: Range 8". Moves any enemy model within range D6" directly away from the Shaman. If the target collides with another model or a building, both suffer 1 S3 hit. Note: Very handy for dropping people from high buildings with. May not be cast on models in hand-to-hand combat.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Range 8". Moves any enemy model within range D6" directly away from the Shaman. If the target collides with another model or a building, both suffer 1 S3 hit. May not be cast on models in hand-to-hand combat.

spells.name: Zzap!
spells.flavour: A crackling green bolt of WAAAGH! energy erupts from the Shaman’s forehead to strike the skull of the closest foe. This energy easily overloads the brain of a weak-willed opponent.
spells.ruleFull: Range 12". Causes D3 S4 hits on the closest enemy target, with no armour saves allowed.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Range 12". Causes D3 S4 hits on the closest enemy target, with no armour saves allowed.

spells.name: Fooled Ya!
spells.flavour: The Shaman disappears in a green mist, confusing his enemies.
spells.ruleFull: No enemy may charge the Shaman during their next turn. If the Shaman is engaged in hand-to-hand combat he may immediately move 4" away.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: No enemy may charge the Shaman during their next turn. If the Shaman is engaged in hand-to-hand combat he may immediately move 4" away.

spells.name: Clubba
spells.flavour: A huge, green club appears in the hand of the Shaman.
spells.ruleFull: The ectoplasmic club counts as a normal club with +2 Strength bonus and gives the Shaman +1 attack as well. This spell lasts until the Shaman suffers a wound.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: The ectoplasmic club counts as a normal club with +2 Strength bonus and gives the Shaman +1 attack as well. This spell lasts until the Shaman suffers a wound.

spells.name: Fire of Gork
spells.flavour: Twin bolts of green flame shoot from the Shaman’s nose to strike the nearest enemy model.
spells.ruleFull: Range 12". Each of the two bolts causes D3 S3 hits; the bolts can either be fired both at the closest enemy target or split between the two closest enemy targets.
spells.ruleAbbreviated: Range 12". Each of the two bolts causes D3 S3 hits; the bolts can either be fired both at the closest enemy target or split between the two closest enemy targets.
